Nya mǝntǝ lǝ ilǝ fǝ lǝ unyǝki okpe fǝ.
6Itsyise nwǝ Bonamute laalaa,
wǝ wǝǝnǝ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ.
Nya nwǝ tsya woafo fe ubii,
wǝ wǝǝnǝ koto nɛ.”
7Bifi mi kanyi saa ka biǝnyǝ fe Onanto nlɛ mi bunǝ butǝ fe wǝ bebi. Ubi utsyuǝ kpe bǝ anto ǝǝnǝ wǝ? 8Lǝ bǝǝnnǝ mi fe kase bunyi boǝ bǝǝnǝ ubi saa, nyalɛ bienyifo wǝ bebi tinti. Etǝ bǝ biyifo fe bebi ba anto dímamfo seka. 9Lǝ bo betidinini eto antomǝ seka lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bǝǝnǝ bo nya boebu mǝ tsya lǝ nyamfo eso. Ntsyǝ eso yanle bǝ bobokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ enso butǝ Onanto wǝ ni bo Anto lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ bǝ busiǝ nkpǝ! 10Bo kasɔ mfo eto antomǝ ǝǝnǝ bo itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ fe kase bǝnyǝ bǝ iińyǝ itǝ bo. Fɛɛ Onanto wǝ ǝǝnǝ bo fe kase ɛlɛkɛ itǝ bo bǝ lǝ bo tsya lǝ bunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ sɛkɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ. 11Bunǝtǝtǝ utidii, aankɛ kutsyuǝ kamini, bomu yeefi wǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ nnya kamaa, mba bǝtǝ bunǝ nkoo, ǝǝtǝ beeyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, nnya lǝǝtǝ bǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.
12Lǝ nyamfo esoo, bekpe mi ani ku akpa nnya leetinkǝ ale, lǝ bitǝ ǝsuǝale fɔfɔ lǝ idufǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. 13Bilǝkǝ esu nnya lekpa lǝ bɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ mba eto akpa lǝmbǝ ale lǝ bafo bɔyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝ bentusǝ. Bomu lǝ bǝtǝkǝko mi kama lǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale balosǝ.
14Bekplatsya bǝ lǝ diyuǝ lǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mi ku betidi kenke eto nti, nya lǝ bekplatsya lǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ kɛnkɛ. Itsyise kuutsyuǝ saa embunyǝ Bonamute lǝ wenyifo kɛnkɛ. 15Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ eto kusu manya mi. Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ biǝntǝ kuutsyuǝ saa tǝ lǝ binyǝ ɔblɔ kekleke bǝ inǝ bulǝ eboko betidi kpǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ bafiani babuayifo. 16Bebe biǝ mi kuutsyuǝ saa mamfiani ɔsɔnɔdi nye fe nwǝ lǝmbǝ bofokanɔ fe Esau seka, wǝ dífi wǝ sininǝdidi ófloma ku didisa eto ɔkpɛ ɔni hã. 17Kama kama fe kase binyii, ɔ́bɛbɛ ku binǝntu nkǝ eni lǝ ofo wǝ anto eto atsyɔkpoko. Fɛɛ wátɔnɔ útǝ wǝ, itsyise wámfo kusu saa bunyǝ lǝ ofloma lesa nǝ úkeyifo útsyǝ.
18Itsyise inni Sinai eto kɔtini ko utidi loofo bunyǝ ketidi ɔflɔ bíbǝ, fe kase Israel bebi díyifo. Mfó ketuntu suu ka diti kpii, nya ufiebi nlɛ bɔsɔ kekleke nkpe, fɛɛ kɔtɔni komǝ nlɛ bunyǝ diadiadia. 19Kakpatsyaku ka nlɛ bufǝ ku ɔkɔɛ wǝ nlɛ bɔbɔ ketsyi mfó lɛ bole, nya mba nlɛ nya bɔnɔ álɛ lekpakpa bǝnkǝ bensila bǝ baanɔ kolesa nko bio. 20Itsyise bembofo buńnyǝ kanɔ kɔfi ko nlɛ mǝ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ ubuki uni kulaa tsya wǝ eto kokpa ditidi kɔtini komǝǝ, bakpɔ wǝ aba balo.” 21Lǝ sitintii, nya bǝlǝkǝ báte mfó kpe sikpi tinti bǝ Moses kosate átɛyi nkǝ, “Sikpi ko dímuǝ mɛ, nya mintinkǝ!”
22Bomu mi alɛɛ, Sion eto kɔtini komǝ ɔflɔ bíbǝ. Bíbǝ Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ eto umǝ wǝ ni Yerusalem kato ku wǝ batɔnkpe ba bembofo bokla ba lekpe disi mfo ɔflɔ. 23Bíbǝ disuǝyuǝ eto disikakpekɔ ku Onanto eto bebininǝ ba eto aye báwɔni bakpe lǝ Onanto eto kukue kato ɔflɔ. Bíbǝ bińyǝ lǝ Onanto, kawunsiǝ kenke eto okponkpo ku basɛɛ ba béyifo lɛflɔ eto awɔnɔ eto nti. 24Nya mfó bíbǝ Yesu wǝ laafo kǝtǝ lǝ kakle fɔfɔ kamǝ ɔflɔ kaka kɔtɔ ko ókpo lǝ bo disi luunǝ asa sɛɛ kpǝ eboko nnya nso Abel eto kɔtɔ.
25Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ bianni nwǝ nlɛ mi etiki budinko eto ɔkɔɛ. Itsyise lǝ mba dímentsyue koto nwǝ léboko mǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ kasɔ mfo mámfo butsyetsyi kedu lǝ mǝ kotonǝnǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ntsyǝ yoofo bubǝ bǝ bo mba bátɛyi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ itsyi kato ebofo butsyetsyi lǝ ni kɛnyɛ? 26Lefe nǝmfó wǝ ɔkɔɛ étinkǝsǝ kawunsiǝ kenke. Fɛɛ mɔmɔ útsyǝ bo kɛnyɛ nkǝ, “Bioo, mǝǝbǝ kawunsiǝ kamǝ butinkǝsǝ. Nya inni nko mate tsya, bomu muutinkǝsǝ kato tsya nwunsǝ.” 27Ditiki nǝmfo bǝ, “Bioo” lǝ bote bǝ, Onanto ebulǝkǝ asa nnya dítinkǝ nnya ni asa nnya úyifo uwui lǝ nnya kǝńyǝnkɔ. Nya asa nnya dímentinkǝǝ, ebubu itsyǝ.
28Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔsɔ ani bǝ sekakedikɔ ka lembofo butinkǝ áka bo kɔni. Lǝ nnya esoo, bítǝ lǝ bufi dibu ku sikpitete busumu wǝ lǝ kusu ko lɔɔkɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ ǝsuǝ. 29Itsyise bo Onanto ǝmǝ eyifo ute wǝ laatonsǝ lesa saa.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 13
Content:
Lɛ Ǝsuǝ Lǝ Kase Yuudufǝ Onanto Ǝnǝ.
1Bitǝ lǝ sɛyimila lǝ siyi mi ǝsuǝ fe bayimi. 2Bianni bafɔ bofo, itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, bǝtsyuǝ áfo Onanto eto batɔnkpe, fɛɛ bánte nko. 3Bekloma mba bákpe lǝ Aba eto diyo tsya fe mba mi ku mǝ nlabe mfó. Nko kee, bekloma mba banlɛ ohiã bote fe mi ku mǝ banlɛ ohiã bote.
4Usǝ ku usiǝ siǝ nkpǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ, nya ele bǝ utsyuǝ saa fi dibu utǝ kǝsiǝ. Nya kuutsyuǝ mamfe wǝ utsyuǝ kama, itsyise Onanto ebokponko mba leedi asɔnɔ, kakpo kusǝ nye kusiǝ lekpo. 5Mansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi tsya lǝ atabi ǝsuǝ. Bomu bitǝ lǝ lesa nǝ nte mi lǝ didufǝ mi ǝnǝ. Itsyise Onanto átɛyi nkǝ,
“Mǝmboyani mi ntsyǝ kulefe,
nya membulǝkǝ ato lǝ mi ǝsuǝ tsya kulefe.”
6Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔtɛyi taa bo ketu kǝmiǝ boǝ,
“Bonamute ni mɔ ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ, nyaso mǝmbote sikpi.
Be utiditsyuǝ loofo mɛ buyifo?”
7Bekloma mi batɔnkotɔnko ba dísiǝ ba lɛtɛyi mi Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ. Bekloma kase bǝsiǝ nkpǝ ku kase báfo Onanto bánɔ lǝ bɛyɛ le mǝ kayɛkɔ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. 8Yesu Kristo aamfloma kulefe. Fe kase útsyǝ lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, nko ke unte mɔmɔ ku lefe nǝ luubǝ kenke tsya nɛ.
9Biǝntǝ lǝ asatete akpa akpa nnya lǝmbǝ disi ku akpa lǝ ɛwɛ mi ekpe lǝ benya kusu. Onanto eto lefonǝ hã laakpe bo nkɛale, nya inni afi nnya lɛyɛ lǝ lesadidi ǝsuǝ. Mba laayɛ lǝ afi nyamfo ǝsuǝ ǝǝnnyǝ bɔwunsǝko nye kutǝkǝ ketsyiko lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.
10Boo, bokpe kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba nǝ ǝsuǝ asa nnya boedi, nya mba lǝǝtǝ kedi lǝ Yudafɔ eto kedikǝtǝkɔ, yanle bǝ bedi betsyiko lǝ bo ole.
11Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmǝ eefi ubuki eto kɔtɔ kedufǝnko kaka ni Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke. Mfó weesu kǝtǝ kedi katɔ bufikatsyɛ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto abua eto disi. Fɛɛ baatonsǝ bebuki eto sinǝ siamǝ lǝ kabanto. 12Mmǝ kenke seka ini bǝ Yesu tsya ǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ eto kabanto bǝ lǝ uflǝ betidi eto abua uwui ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ. 13Nyaso bitǝ lǝ busu botsyako wǝ lǝ kabanto mfó lǝ bakpe bo kofani faa, fe kase bákpe wuntsya kofani. 14Itsyise umǝ saa ǝmbǝ bo lǝ kasɔ mfo wǝ luutsyǝ lefe saa manlo manlo. Bomu bunyǝ bɔlɛ kusu bobe itǝ umǝ wǝ luubǝ.
15Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ bufi atɛsǝ fe keditǝtǝ bukǝtǝ Onanto lefe saa. Nya ni nnya laabɔ ketsyi lǝ mba léfo wǝ diye bánɔ eto kɛnyɛ. 16Bianta asa sɛɛ buyifo kǝtǝ bǝtsyuǝ ku bǝtsyuǝ bɔwunsǝko ǝsuǝ. Itsyise ite fe keditǝtǝ ka eto okle laakpe Onanto disuǝyuǝ.
17Bitsyue mi batɔnkotɔnko koto lǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mǝ itsyise mǝ nlɛ mi kakla bobe lefe saa nɛ, itsyise ele bǝ bǝlǝkǝ nya kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Lǝ bitsyue mǝ kotoo, booyifo mǝ keyifo ku disuǝyuǝ, fɛɛ lenni nkoo, kuulǝ mǝ ku buyifo nya lǝmbǝwunsǝko mi.
18Bikato ola lǝ bo disi. Buyi boǝ bo akɔɛsi akpa wuee, itsyise bola boǝ boeyifo kasɛɛ lefe saa. 19Nya nlɛ mi lekpakpa kekleke miǝ lǝ beto ola biǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ utǝ kusu lǝ nsinkli mbǝ mi ɔflɔ mlǝ.
Olatoto Fɛfɛ.
20Nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝ, wǝ létakasǝ Bonamute Yesu wǝ ni basamu eto ɔyɛnkonyǝ kplɛ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ ɛyɛ lǝ kɛnyɛklekle manlo eto kɔtɔ komǝ ǝsuǝ, 21lǝ ufi asa sɛɛ kenke utǝ mi kafo faa bǝ lǝ befo wǝ lelabi buyifo. Lǝ eyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ uyifo lesa nǝ nkpe wǝ ɔkɔɛ lǝ bo nti. Wǝ ale lǝ idi diyǝnde kplɛ idu manlo isu manlo ǝsuǝ! Ibǝ itǝ.
Etiki Fɛfɛ.
22Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi lekpakpa tinti miǝ lǝ bitsyue ato lǝ bɛnɔ kɔlɛ ko minlɛ mi bɔlɛ itsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise kukue kliminti ete miwɔni minlɛ mi botsyese.
23Nla miǝ mǝǝtǝ mi bote miǝ bǝlǝkǝ bo ɔyimi Timoteo lǝ Aba eto diyo. Lǝ wuubǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mlǝǝ, bonko wǝ ebubǝ bunyǝ mi busiǝsǝ.
24Bisiǝsǝ mi batɔnkotɔnko kenke ku Onanto eto betidi bamfó kenke bitǝ bo. Bo bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Italia kenke tsya ǝsiǝsǝ mi.
25Lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ kenke.

Title: YAKOBO 1
Content:
1Mɔ, Yakobo, wǝ ni Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto uyifoyifo nlɛ mi Onanto eto betidi ba kenke disensǝ bankpo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto akpa nyamǝ kenke busiǝsǝ.
Binyǝ Disuǝyuǝ Lǝ Bulǝ Lɛ Mi Butu.
2Mɔ bayimi, binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ bulǝ kpǝ lete, lete lɛ mi butu. 3Itsyise biyi biǝnkǝ lǝ bulǝ lɛ mi butu nya mi bofokanɔ dítǝ befo buńyǝ lǝ mu kɛnyɛɛ, nyamfo ebutǝ biofo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ bulǝ saa eto kɛnyɛ. 4Bitǝ lǝ mi bofo buńyǝ kekleke disimǝntǝmǝntǝǝ, lǝ ekpa mi ɛyɛnko bǝ lǝ bɛflɔ belo kenke, bǝ kulesa saa ensiebofe itǝ mi. 5Fɛɛ lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ ebu dímamflɔ lǝ kobetete ǝsuǝǝ, ɔtɔ Onanto nya wuufi utǝ wǝ, itsyise Onanto eefi asa kǝtǝ utidi saa kafo faa lǝ kafoɛkpɛ ǝsuǝ. 6Fɛɛ lǝ alɛ ola boto katɔ wǝ lesatsyuǝǝ, ele bǝ fo wǝ anɔ fǝ wuutǝ fǝ lesa nǝ mǝ, manyaki wǝ. Itsyise utidi wǝ kayakii, uyifo fe lekpo eto utuwa ufiebi laasɔ ketsyi katsyilamako. 7-8Utidi wǝ nte nko, mi mba eto nsusu lafloma mlǝ mlǝ lǝ lesa nǝ ɔnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝǝ, membu nkǝ woofo kulesa utsyiko lǝ Bonamute ɔflɔ.
9Lǝ Onanto abesǝ ɔyimi okombo wǝ ni ofokanɔnyǝ katoo, ele bǝ unyǝ disuǝyuǝ. 10Nko ke ini itǝ otabinyǝ wǝ ni ofokanɔnyǝ nɛ, bǝ lǝ Onanto ábokosǝ wǝ kasɔɔ, ele bǝ unyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Itsyise otabinyǝ eto nkpǝ ebubǝ bofe fe kase efukpokpo laalo lǝ ofa ǝsuǝ kakpo lǝ kasɔ. 11Lǝ kofe ato kobe kɛnyɛ keklekee, koafa kakpo lǝ sefa eto esi ǝsuǝǝ, itǝ efukpokpo nyamǝ aylɔbe, kaalo kakpo lǝ kasɔ nya katsylɔ. Nko ke ini itǝ otabinyǝ tsya wǝ lookakplatsya lǝ wǝ keyifoyifo ǝsuǝ kekleke fɛ ubǝ ukpǝ nɛ.
12Onanto ebokpo atsyɔ nwǝ ke lékpe utu uńyǝ kekleke lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ nya útǝkǝ bulǝ nye kabua kamǝ kato. Itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ wuunyǝ kayofofo ka nkpe, ini bo Onanto luufi utǝ mba laala wǝ. 13Lǝ utsyuǝ edufǝ lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝǝ, wantɛyi nkǝ Onanto ɔflɔ itsyi. Itsyise kulesa embofo Onanto boto kabe lǝ uyifo lebua, nya wǝ tsya emfi lebua kanto kuutsyuǝ kabe. 14Bomu utidi eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto alasaa, nnya laawɛ wǝ kǝnǝ wǝ kakpe lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ nɛ. 15Nya lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto alasa nyamfo alɛ kafoo, kaale lebuayifoyifo. Nya lǝ lebuayifoyifo nǝmǝ abee, diale ukpe. 16Mɔ bayimi, biǝntǝ lǝ kutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpe.
17Asa sɛɛ nnya nkpe bo kenke ku ǝtǝsa nnya lɛflɔ kenke boǝnyǝǝ, etsyi Boanto Onanto wǝ díyifo kato eto ǝnyǝlesa ɔflɔ. Nya woamfloma kakpe ketuntu fe kase úyifo kofe ku kofande leeyifo. 18Onato áyɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto lelabi ǝsuǝ, nya úlǝkǝ bo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ɔnukualɛtiki ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ budi betutɛ lǝ wǝ asayifoyifo kenke nti.
Ele Bǝ Bikeyifo Lǝ Bonamute Eto Ditiki Ǝsuǝ.
19Mɔ bayimi lala, bekloma lǝ bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ. Bɛkɔse lǝ bitsyue ato mlǝ lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ etiki budi, fɛɛ bitsyǝsuǝ lǝ etikididi ku ɔblɔnyǝnyǝ mlǝ mlǝ ǝsuǝ. 20Itsyise ɔblɔ ǝntǝ utidi leeyifo kasɛɛ ka Onanto laala nkǝ uyifo. 21Nyaso bilǝkǝ ani bitsyiko lǝ asinsa saa yifoyifo ku nkpǝ bua saa eto okle busiǝ ǝsuǝ. Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Onanto bǝ lǝ befo wǝ ditiki nǝ ókpe mi lǝ akɔɛsi, nnya ni loofo utǝ mi lǝ nkpǝ nɛ.
22Bianwɛ mi ǝsuǝ biǝ bɛlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔnɔ ete, bomu bifi ni bekpe lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ. 23-24Itsyise nwǝ laanɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ete fɛ weenyifo lǝ ni ǝsuǝǝ, akate ko utidi wǝ lǝǝnyǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ ahuhɔɛ ǝsuǝ kǝnyǝ kase unte. Fɛɛ lǝ kokpa lǝkǝlǝkǝ kedu mfo koo, woatasuǝ kase unte. 25Fɛɛ nwǝ leebu disi lǝ kɔfi ko lɛflɔ koǝtǝ utidi lǝsiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nya woalɛ ola keyifo lǝ ko ǝsuǝ inni bɔnɔ te waanɔ koo, Onanto ebokpo wǝ atsyɔ lǝ lesa saa nǝ weeyifo ǝsuǝ.
26Lǝ utsyuǝ eebu nkǝ nwǝ leesumu Onanto uni, fɛ woanlɛ wǝ odiakami ola lǝ etikididi ǝsuǝǝ, ɔwɛ ǝsuǝ nya wǝ kesumu ǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa. 27Kesumu ka nyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, ka Boanto Onanto lǝǝnyǝ nkǝ kakpa nya botakebu saa lǝmbǝ lǝ muu, ni mbo mfo nɛ bǝ, balɛ bakɔbebi ku bakɔbǝsiǝ ba nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ ola, nya lǝ balɛ ǝsuǝ ola, bǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ betsyiko lǝ kawunsiǝ eto abuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

Title: YAKOBO 2
Content:
Biankpe Kabakefe Lǝ Betidi Nti.
1Mɔ bayimi, fe mba lefo Bonamute Yesu Kristo, wǝ nwǝ ni Diyǝnde eto Onamute bɛnɔɔ, yanle bǝ bikabe betidi eto ǝnǝmi ku mǝ nyǝnkɔɔ, bikeyifo asa. 2Boefi boǝ betidi inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ mi katsyakɔ. Ɔni eyifo ɔkplɛnyǝ wǝ nti kafia kplɛ ka lefo koya nya onkpe sika sia eto lɛsukpɛ lǝ lɛnimi, nya unuǝfǝ wǝ ni okombo nti lefianku. 3Békpasǝ ǝnǝmi bítǝ ɔkplɛnyǝ ǝmǝ nya béfo wǝ ku dibu, bɛtɛyi wǝ biǝnkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa, bǝ ǝsiǝ lǝ kakplɛkɔ mfo.” Nya bɛtɛyi okombo ǝmǝ biǝkǝ, “Fǝǝ ńyǝ mmǝǝ, nye bǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔnti lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mfo.” 4Lǝ biyifo nkomǝǝ, nyalɛ eni nsusu bua ini bífi béla etiki bílǝkǝ, békpe kabakefe lǝ betidi nti nɛ?
5Bɛnɔ! Mɔ bayimi lala, Onanto ǝlǝkǝ bakombo lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo nkǝ bafiani lɛwɔnɔ eto bakplɛnyǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ, lǝ bǝnyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ ka úlǝkǝ utsyǝ itǝ mba laala wǝ. 6Fɛɛ mii, biembu bakombo nya biakpe mǝ kafani. Inni batabinyǝ bomu laanyinkǝ mi kakpe kasɔ? Inni mǝ lǝǝnǝ mi kesuko akpokakpokɔ? 7Nya inni bakplɛnyǝ bamfo laatɛyi kabua ketsyiko dibu eto diye nǝ béfi bǝtǝkǝ mi se béfiani Kristo eto bafokanɔfɔ?
8Lǝ biyifo lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝ tututu, fe kase báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, “La fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe fǝ ǝsuǝ sekaa,” ete eyifo lesa nǝ dińyǝ itǝ nɛ. 9Fɛɛ lǝ biabe betidi eto ǝnǝmi fɛ bieyifo asaa, nyalɛ biyifo lebua. Nya kɔfi komǝ tsya lélo mi dikpi fe babuayifo. 10Utsyuǝ saa ke léta kɔfi kɔni ubuu, údi dikpi, óta nyamblɛ kenke ubu. 11Itsyise nwǝ lékpe kɔfi komǝ nkǝ, “Mankpo kusiǝ nye kusǝ.” Wǝ ke lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Manlo utidi nɛ.” Nyaso lǝ émendi sɛsɔnɔ fɛ fálo utidii, ete bɛ áta kɔfi ebu. 12Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bo etikididi ku bo eyifosa lǝ ilǝkǝ ete bǝ kɔfi ko dítǝ bófo bunsi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ko kefi Onanto luufi okponko bo lekpo tsya nɛ. 13Itsyi lǝ lekpokponkpo nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto embunyǝ kaminsǝ kuutsyuǝ saa wǝ lǝǝnnyǝ wǝ utsyuǝ kaminsǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto embolo dikpi nwǝ lǝǝnyǝ wǝ utsyuǝ kaminsǝ.
Biyifo Asa Nnya Laate Bǝ Béfo Bɛnɔ.
14Mɔ bayimi, lǝ mi utsyuǝ nkǝ okpe bofokanɔ fɛ wǝ eyifosa lǝnlǝkǝ nnya kate nkoo, nte kutǝkǝ ko uunyǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Wǝ bofokanɔ bomfo ebofo wǝ bulǝkǝ? 15Bifi nnya biǝ, bayimisani nye bayimisio bǝtsyuǝ kpe ba mfia léla mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nye bǝmbǝ lesa nǝ looyo mǝ budi ekemi. 16Nte kasɛɛ ka nkpe lǝ nnya lǝ mi ɔni átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bisu lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ, mi ǝsuǝ lǝ iyifo kpankpa, lǝ bidi bimi,” fɛ biambɛbɛ asa nnya lefe itǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto nkpǝkɛkɛ bitǝ mǝǝ, nte kutǝkǝ ko nkpe lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? 17Nyaso lǝ bofokanɔ mate kpe utsyuǝ nya keyifo sa dimankɔ lǝ mu, wǝ bofokanɔ bomǝ eyifo bufufu.
18Fɛɛ bǝtsyuǝ ebɔtɛyi bǝ, “Utidi ɔni kpe bofokanɔ, nya obamba tsya leeyifo keyifo.” Mɔ mbuayɛ ni nkǝ, “Lǝkǝ ate mɛ kase utsyuǝ lɔɔkɛ bofokanɔ fɛ weenyifo keyifo sɛɛ. Muulǝkǝ mɔ bofokanɔ nte wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ keyifo sɛɛ ka meeyifo ǝsuǝ.” 19Afo anɔ fǝ Onanto ɔni ete nkpe? Nko ini sitinti nɛ. Fɛɛ kloma fǝ awɔnɔ bua tsya áfo banɔ nko, nya baate sikpi, ketinkǝ. 20Ɔmumu! Ala fǝ nlǝkǝ nte fǝ bǝ bofokanɔ bo keyifo sɛɛ saa dímakɔkoo, eyifo bofokanɔ fufu? 21Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ bo Ona Abraham díyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi? Ɛyɛ lǝ lesa nǝ úyifo eso nɛ, itsyise úfi wǝ ubi Isak úsu útǝkǝ lǝ kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ ufi wǝ utǝ Onanto kedi. 22Bɛnlɛ bunyǝ? Wǝ bofokanɔ ku keyifo lɛkɔ iyifo lɔni. Nya keyifo ka úyifo lɛkɔ nya fɛ wǝ bofokanɔ lɛflɔ bolo nɛ. 23Itǝ etiki nnya nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ ǝbǝ itǝ bǝ, “Abraham áfo Onanto ɔnɔ, nya lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ esoo, Onanto ákpe wǝ dibu fe utidi wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ.” Nyaso Onanto dífi wǝ fe wǝ ɔyɛtsyuǝ nɛ. 24Bíunyǝ mɔmɔ! Onanto ǝnnyǝ utidi eto bofokanɔ mate ete kebu wǝ bǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ, wǝ keyifoyifoyifo ka laakɔko mu eso. Nya inni lǝ kase ófo ɔ́nɔ eso ete.
25Nko ǝmǝ ke eso Onanto léfo útǝ Rahab, otsyetɔ ǝmǝ nɛ. Wǝ ku Onanto eto nti ǝbǝ ɛlɛkɛ ɛyɛ lǝ kase ófo Israelfɔɔ eto batɔnkpe ba laabiɔ kabe asa lǝ wǝ diyo, nya ɔ́wunsǝko mǝ báyɛ kusu bamba bétsyetsyi bédu eso.
26Nyaso ekpa wuee be fe kase lǝ utidi eto ǝsuǝ eyifo lesakpenkpe lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝmbǝ lǝ nii, nko ini lǝ eyifosa saa mankɔkoo, bofokanɔ tsya ekpe.

Title: YAKOBO 3
Content:
Bɛlɛ Mi Odiakami Ola.
1Mɔ bayimi, biǝntǝ lǝ mi nti eto betidi kpǝ lǝ bafiani bateasa. Buyi buǝ bo mba ni bateasaa, Onanto ebokponko bo lekpo kekleke lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ eso utsyuǝ saa. 2Itsyise bomblɛ kenke aata kebu. Fɛ lǝ utidi utsyuǝ kpe wǝ laanta kebu lǝ lesa nǝ waatɛyi ǝsuǝ nyalɛ utidi ǝmfo aflɔ nya waafo wǝ ǝsuǝ kenke tsya bɔlɛ kukɔnɔ. 3Boefi situ kakle ɔtɔmimi eto kɛnyɛ bǝ lǝ utsyue bo koto bǝ lǝ bɔyɛnko wǝ busuko kaka kee boala. 4Bibu ɔklɔ kplɛ wǝ ufiebi kplɛ laafo se bukǝ kayɛnko lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ wǝ ɔyɛnkoyi kɛkɛ ete laaka wǝ kayɛnko. Nya baaka wǝ kayɛnko kesuko kaka kee okanka ǝmǝ lela nkǝ weesuko ko. 5Nko ke ini odoakami tsya nɛ. Ite bǝ ɔfɛ tinti lǝ etidisuǝ kǝmiǝ tsyaa, wǝ ǝsuǝ utidi laayɛ kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ eyifosa kplɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ. Bebe kase ini bǝ ute eto odiakami kɛkɛ te lǝtǝ kusǝmbia kplɛ lǝǝnyǝ ute kaato.
6Nko seka odiakami tsya nte fe ute nɛ. Uyifo fe kawunsiǝ ka diyi ku lebua eto asa nnya nkpe lǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nti. Woanansǝ ǝsuǝ eto uyi ǝmǝ kenke nya woatsylɔsǝ bo nkpǝsiǝsiǝ. Fɛɛ wǝ kosate, ute manlo kosate laato ute kakpe lǝ wǝ nya woanyǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ flaflafla. 7Utidi áfo bebutubuki buyuǝsǝ, nya wǝǝtsyǝ mba tsya nkpe sisenle ku baklɔbɛ ku mba laakpii kasɔ ku akpɛ ku abamba kenke. 8Fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa mámfo tɔ odiakami eto nkpǝ buyuǝsǝ. Uyifo obuale wǝ bembofo binyinkǝ kakpe, wǝ diyi ku keni ka laalo utidi fe owa eto keni. 9Boefi wǝ katɛsǝ Bonamute ku Boanto Onanto. Boefi wǝ kekudi bo bayimitsyuǝ, utidi wǝ beyifo lǝ Onanto eto ditsyǝbi ǝsuǝ. 10Aninsɔtiki ku ekuditikii, nyamblɛ aabɔ ketsyi lǝ kɛnyɛ kamǝ ke ǝsuǝ. Mɔ bayimi, yanle bǝ nyamfo tsyǝ nko nkpǝ. 11Ditubiǝ kuditsyuǝ aanyifǝ ntu bo nkpe kamini kesi kaayifǝ mbo nkpe mba. 12Mɔ bayimi, kototsyabi ebofo lɛbɛsi bɔnwɔ? Nye aketekubi eto ukue nwɔ kototsyabi eto awɔnsa? Nko ke ditubiǝ nǝ laayifǝ mbantu lǝmbofo ntu bo nkpe kamini bɔyifǝ tsya nɛ.
Onanto Eto Kobe Ǝtǝ Utidi Aabokosǝ Ǝsuǝ Kasɔ.
13Owoe ni obesibe ku nwǝ laanɔ asa kasɔ lǝ mi nti? Ufi nkpǝsiǝsǝ sɛɛ ulǝkǝ nyamfo ote lǝ wǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ, nya uyifo nnya ku ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝbokosǝ ku lǝ kobe ǝsuǝ. 14Fɛɛ lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ biasɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ asa ǝsuǝ, lefonyi nkpe mi, nya mi nti eto utsyuǝ saa laabɛbɛ wǝ mate eto lɛlɛkǝsǝǝ, biantɛyi sidia bela ɔnukualɛ kɛnyɛ, bifi mi bebesǝ ǝsuǝ kato biǝ biyi kobe. 15Kobe komfo eto okle mentsyi kato, bomu kawunsiǝ mfo eto kole kuni, kunni nko nyɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ sɛɛ ǝsuǝ bomu nko nyɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua ǝsuǝ. 16Itsyise kaka kutsyuǝsɛ kpɔnkpɔ ku mɔ hã eto ale lǝ ɛlɛkɛ nkpee, kǝnǝ ku asa buayifoyifo saa eto okle hã laakɛ mfo. 17Fɛɛ tutɛɛ, kobe ko ditsyi kato akpa, kuyi ku diyuǝ, disuǝtsyuǝ ku sɛyɛmitsyuǝ kasɔnɔnɔ, kuyi ku kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ, nya koawɔ ebibi sɛɛ. Koannla ntisensense lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ, nya bǝtsyuǝ mamfokanɔ ku kawɛ saa ankɛ lenti. 18Betidi ba laakpla bǝtsyuǝ nti, kǝnǝ diyuǝ kaboko lǝ betidi ntii, aato eyibibi nnya eto awɔnsa ni nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ.

Title: YAKOBO 4
Content:
Ele Bǝ Bebokosǝ Ǝsuǝ Kasɔ Bitǝ Bonamute.
1Be lǝǝnǝ amakpɔnkpɔ ku niǝ kakpe mi lenti? Yeetsyi lǝ mi kǝnǝnsɛ lǝ nkpǝdidi eto alasa nnya nlɛ mi bɔkpɔnko lǝ kǝmiǝ lefe saa ǝsuǝ. 2Biabɛbɛ kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ, fɛɛ biǝmbofo mi bɔkɛ. Nyaso bialo bǝtsyuǝ. Biabɛbɛ asa kekleke, fɛɛ biamfo nnya bunyǝ, nyaso biǝdiǝ niǝ kakpɔ bǝtsyuǝ. Biankɛ lesa nǝ biabɛbɛ, itsyise biantɔ Onanto biǝ utǝ mi nnya. 3Nya lǝ bɛtɔ Onanto asa tsyaa, biamfo nnya, itsyise biantɔ nnya ku nsusu sɛɛ, biatɔ asa kǝtǝ mi ǝsuǝ mate. Asa nnya biufi bekpe ǝsuǝ disuǝyuǝ hã biatɔ. 4Biyifo betidi ba lendi ɔnukualɛ! Binyi biǝ mba difi mǝ ǝsuǝ beyifo sɛyɛtsyuǝ ku kawunsiǝ kamfo eto nkpǝdidi eyifo Onanto eto balo? Nyaso fǝǝ ke lela fǝnkǝ ǝlǝkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo sɛyɛtsyuǝǝ, éfi fǝ ǝsuǝ éyifo Onanto eto olo. 5Biembu biǝnkǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmbǝ lǝ Anantotiki nnya lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dífi ókpe lǝ boo, eyifo lɛwɔnɔ nǝ laakpɔ sitsyuǝsɛ kekleke lǝ bo disi.” 6Fɛɛ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝ wǝǝtǝ boo, kpe ale leso kulaa. Fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ nyamǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto ǝǝńyǝ lǝ mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ wǝǝtǝ wǝ lefonǝ mba laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.”
7Lǝ nyasoo, bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Onanto. Bińyǝ lǝ Obonsam lǝ ǝsuǝ, ete wuutsyetsyi udu lǝ mi ɔflɔ. 8Bɛyi bɛfi Onanto, ete wuutsya ebɔyi ɔfi mi. Biflǝ mi ani, mi mba ni babuayifo. Biflǝ abua bilǝkǝ lǝ mi akɔɛsi, mi mba eto nsusu laafloma lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ! 9Binyǝ kanyi lǝ mi akɔɛsi, befa bembembe, biwu keku. Befloma mi simǝmǝmǝ lǝ sefiani nkuwuiwui, lǝ mi disuǝyuǝ lǝ diyifo kpɔminii. 10Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ, ete woobesǝ mi kato.
11Mɔ bayimi, biendi ditiki nǝ dińyǝ itǝ lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Nwǝ laatɛyi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ ditiki nǝ dimatsyɛ nye ditiki fimfi, nye laakpoko wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lekpoo, aatɛyi ditiki nǝ dimanlɛkɛ ińyǝ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ, nya waakponko kɔfi komǝ lekpo. Lǝ kɔfi komǝ faakponko lekpoo, nyalɛ ǝmǝnyifo nwǝ leeyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ, bomu ko okponkpo feni. 12Onanto hã ni nwǝ laakpe afi nya uni okponkpo tsya. Wǝ hã loofo bofo kǝtǝ utidi nye ɔtsylɔsǝ wǝ tsya. Owoe feebu fǝ wǝ feni fɛ faakponko fuutsyuǝ lekpo?
Mambesǝ Ǝsuǝ Kato.
13Mɔmɔɔ, bitsyue koto bɛnɔ, mimba laatɛyi biǝkǝ, “Mmi nye kusɛɛ, buusu kusu umǝ nkplɛ utsyuǝ nya budi fe lɛlɛ lɔni mfó, buuyifo nyifo bɔkɛ atabi kpenkpe.” 14Biyi lesa nǝ luubǝ kusɛɛ? Mi nkpǝ te fe kuyuǝ ko laabɔ itǝ lefe kliminti, kesinkli kanya. 15Lesa nǝ ele bǝ bɛtɛyi ni bǝnkǝ, “Lɛ Bonamute atɔnɔ bonkpe nkpǝǝ, buyifo nǝmfo nye nǝmǝ.” 16Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, biaka kase kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato. Ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ bomfo kenke manlɛkɛ.
17Lǝ nya esoo, nwǝ ke nyi lɛsɛ ele bǝ uyifo fɛ ɔni weenyifo nii, aata kebu keyifo lebua.

Title: YAKOBO 5
Content:
Atokǝkǝ Itǝ Batabinyǝ.
1Nya mɔmɔɔ, mi batabinyǝ bɛnɔ! Biwi nku bɛsɔ ani kɛnyɛ lǝ bulǝ kplɛ bo lǝǝbǝ mi butu ǝsuǝ. 2Mi betabikǝ ábia nya balɛ dídi mi awu ku mfia bábiasǝ kenke. 3Mi sika sia ku sika flubia áto nkanda nya nyamfo luudi sedansiɛ ińyǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ nya yotonsǝ mi ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ fe ute seka. Bɛbɛbɛ bikǝ bińyǝnsǝ léto lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nyamfo. 4Bebee! Beyifoyifo ba díyifo keyifo bǝtǝ mi lǝ kakuɛɛ, bɛni bíamfo mǝ nyo. Bidi kaa bɛnɔ kase banlɛ mminsǝku buwui bembembee! Nya mba dífǝsǝ bɛkuɛnkɛ bǝtǝ mi fɛ bɛni bíamfo mǝ nyo eto kudu díkayo Boanto Onanto Ɔkplɛnyǝ ǝmǝ eto kotoo. 5Mi nkpǝ bo binsi lǝ kasɔ mfo eyi ku nkpǝdidi ku disuǝyuǝnyǝnyǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃. Nya bíyifo mi ǝsuǝ bísiǝ ayinkua itǝ diyi nǝmǝ itǝ bolo. 6Bélo betidi ba dímanta mi bebu dikpi, nya bélo mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bántaka bǝńyǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ kulaa tsya.
Bekpe Utu Buɛɛ, Bińyǝ Bisǝkǝ Bonamute Ǝmǝ Eto Bubǝ Bio.
7Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, bifi disuǝtsyǝ lǝ bekpe utu buɛɛ bińyǝ isu ese lefe nǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ luubǝ bio. Bebe kase ɔkuɛmfo nkpe disuǝtsyǝ! Bebe kase woǝńyǝ buɛɛ kǝsǝkǝ bɛkuɛnkǝ kpenkpe bia wǝǝbǝ bunyǝ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ kasɔ, nya wǝǝńyǝ buɛɛ kǝsǝkǝ ɔsɔmi eto bɔni lǝ lefe sɛɛ ǝsuǝ. 8Nko ele bǝ mi tsya muǝ utu bɛlɛ nɛ. Biǝntǝ lǝ ani elo mi, itsyise Bonamute ǝmǝ eto dibǝfe bio eboyo elo.
9Mɔ bayimi, biǝndiǝ niǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ, bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔyɛ mi lekpo bokponko. Itsyise okponkpo ǝmǝ eto bubɛ bɔfi. 10Mɔ bayimi, bekloma Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba lébe ditiki nǝ mǝ letsya lǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ eti diye ǝsuǝ. Bitǝ lǝ bobe kase bǝnyǝ kanyi nya bǝmuǝ utu balɛɛ, lǝ bokase asa lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. 11Boakpo betidi bamba boǝ mba bakpo atsyɔ, itsyise bǝńyǝ bembe lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ. Biɔnɔ kase Hiob dímuǝ utu ɔlɛ ku kase Onanto léfo wǝ nnya layo lǝ kalosǝkɔ. Itsyise Bonamute kpe kafoɛkpɛ nya woǝnyǝ utidi kaminsǝ.
12Mɔ bayimi, ditiki kekleke nǝ mɔɔtɛyi mi ni bǝnkǝ biankpadi asa, kato keni o-o, kasɔ keni o-o, nye lesa bamba saa dini o-o, biankpadi. Lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ kpee, bɛtɛyi biǝ ee. Nya lǝ dimbǝǝ, bɛtɛyi biǝ oowo, lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔyɛ mi dikpi bolo.
13Lǝ utsyuǝ kpe lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ nye ɔnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ mi ntii, oto ola utǝ Onanto. Lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝǝ, usǝ atɛsǝ eto ǝsǝ. 14Lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ lɛ bufii, bekpadi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto beninǝ lǝ bato ola lǝ wǝ disi, lǝ bediki wǝ nuǝbi lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ. 15Ola wǝ báto lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ ǝbotsya ufunfi ǝmǝ, nya Bonamute lootakasɛ wǝ, nya lufi wǝ abua ɔtsyɛ wǝ. 16Nyaso bilǝkǝ mi abua kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ beto ola lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ eto disi lǝ binyǝ bufitsyantsya. Utidi sɛɛ eto olatoto kpe ǝsuǝale nya weeyifo keyifo tinti. 17Elia éyifo utidi fe kase bo tsya ni. Se óto ala kekleke nkǝ ɔsɔmi yɛ bɔnii, ɔ́yɛ bɔni lǝ alɛ ǝtsyǝ ku kutsyǝ ǝsuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃. 18Lǝ nnya kamaa, usi óto ola, nya Onanto dítǝ ɔsɔmi lɛni nya bidikǝ lɛlɛkɛ lǝ kasɔ kamǝ.
19Mɔ bayimi, lǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ kama lǝ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝǝ, bekplatsya lǝ beekpa wǝ beboko, 20bekloma biǝ utsyuǝ saa ke lookpa obuayifo utsyiko lǝ kabuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ obokoo, wuutǝ obuayifo ǝmǝ nyǝ nkpǝ ku abua kpǝ nnya úyifo eto bufukatsyɛ.

Title: 1 PETRO 1
Content:
1Kukue komfo etsyi mɔ, Petro, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpe ɔflɔ. Nlɛ ko bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mimba ni Onanto eto betidilǝkǝlǝkǝ ba dísensǝ bísu benkpe fe bafɔ lǝ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia ku Bitinia eto nsɔ ǝsuǝ. 2Anto Onanto kosate dílǝkǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Nya itǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lékpasǝ mi ǝsuǝ biyifo betidi kɛnkɛ bǝ lǝ bitsyue Yesu Kristo koto, lǝ befi wǝ kɔtɔ bǝflǝ mi lǝ bele.
Lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ difui disiǝko mi lefe saa.
Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Lesa Nǝ Banlɛ Kusu Bobe Kǝtǝ.
3Bitǝ lǝ bɔsɔ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto ani. Lǝ wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, útǝ bo nkpǝ fɔfɔ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ótakase Yesu Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ eso. Nyamfo ǝtǝ bo kusubebe fɔfɔ ko lɛflɔ. 4Lǝ nyasoo, bɛlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝ kedikɔ eto atsyɔkpokpo fokoya ko Onanto lɛlɔ utsyǝ lǝ kato itǝ wǝ betidi ke lembobia, ka lemboto kɔti, ka lǝmbɔflɛ tsya. 5Kedikɔ kamfo luudi mi kale, mimba ɛyɛ lǝ bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ bálɔ mi bǝtsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ itǝ bofokǝtǝ lǝ nkpǝ bo buulǝkǝ bate lǝ lefe fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.
6Binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ, ite bǝ biunyǝ kanyi lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ botokabe kpǝ ǝsuǝ tsya. 7Nnya ni bǝ lǝ befi bato mi babe bǝ befo bɛnɔ sitinti. Fe kase baato sika sia laafo bobia kabe lǝ utee, nko ke bǝǝbǝ mi bofokanɔ bo lefo koya bonso sika kulaa tsya boto kabe lǝ ute ǝsuǝ, lǝ befi babe bǝ buutsyǝ itǝ lefe saa. Nyamfo ebutǝ Onanto atɛsǝ mi obesǝ mi kato ufi dibu utǝ mi lǝ diyi nǝ Yesu Kristo lɔɔbɔ ubǝ bǝnyǝ wǝ. 8Ite bǝ biǝnyǝ wǝ tɔ binyǝ tsyaa, biala wǝ. Se bɛnnlɛ wǝ bunyǝ mɔmɔ tsyaa, béfo wǝ bɛnɔ nya mi disuǝyuǝnyǝnyǝ nso bulǝkǝ katɛyi. 9Kase béfo wǝ bɛnɔ esoo, itǝ bǝ Onato ǝtǝ nkǝ mi kakla nyǝ nkpǝ.
10Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba lébe letsya itsyi lǝ kase Onanto lǝǝbǝ mi ǝtǝsa butǝǝ, átɔ bánɔ nya báfefe kekleke lǝ kase Onanto lǝǝbǝ mi bofo lǝ nkpǝ. 11Báfefe bǝ lǝ bate itsyi lǝ lefe nǝ yuubǝ ku kase yǝǝbǝ bubǝ. Lefe nǝmfo ni lefe nǝ Kristo eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ nlɛ kɔni bote, kǝlǝkǝ kate kanyi ka Kristo ele bǝ unyǝ ku diyǝnde nǝ luutǝkǝ nnya kama. 12Onanto ǝlǝkǝ óte bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi bamfo nkǝ inni itǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto kutǝkǝ eso banlɛ keyifo, bomu itǝ mi. Bédi etiki betsyiko asa nnya mba nlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi mɔmɔ ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ Onanto létsyese itsyi kato eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Onanto eto batɔnkpe kulaa tsya ála kokoko bǝ eni lǝ bate lesaatsyuǝ itsyi lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ fɛ.
Ele Bǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Siǝ Nkpe Kɛnkɛ.
13Nyaso bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ itǝ keyifo. Bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ bikabe kusu kekleke itǝ Onanto eto atsyɔkpokpo nnya wuutǝ mi lǝ lefe nǝ Yesu Kristo lɔɔbɔ bǝnyǝ. 14Bitsyue Onanto eto ditiki koto nya biǝntǝ lǝ asa nnya díkǝnǝ mi kakpe lǝ abua ǝsuǝ kɔ, lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto ditiki dímankpako mi tɔɔ, lǝ isi eso mi ani mɔmɔ. 15Bomuu, fe kase Onanto wǝ lékpadi mi nte kɛnkɛɛ, mi tsya tsyǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ lesa saa nǝ biuyifo ǝsuǝ. 16Itsyise báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Biyifo kɛnkɛ, itsyise nyifo kɛnkɛ.”
17Biakpadi wǝ biǝ Boanto lǝ bɛlɛ ola boto kǝtǝ Onanto wǝ laambe utidi eto ǝnǝmi lǝ ɔlɛ lekpo bokpo ku utidi lǝ lesa nǝ utsyuǝ saa díyifo ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nyasoo, fe bafɔ lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bisiǝ mi nkpǝ fɛfɛ bifi dibu bitǝ Onanto. 18Itsyise biyi kayo ka Onanto léfo lǝ mi disi fɛ úlǝkǝ mi utsyiko lǝ nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ bo béfo bitsyiko lǝ mi banamǝ ɔflɔ. Inni lesa nǝ boofo bobiasǝ fe sika sia lee sika flubia seka. 19Bomu iyifo Kristo eto kɔtɔ ko lefo koya, wǝ díyifo fe Lesamubi nǝ lebua saa lǝmbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, lékpa lɛflɔ kenke Onanto dífi útǝ kedi lǝ mi disi. 20Onanto ǝlǝkǝ wǝ utsyǝ fɛ béyifo kawunsiǝ nya úlǝkǝ wǝ óte lǝ eyifɛfɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝ lǝ mi disi eso. 21Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝmfo ǝsuǝ esoo, béfo Onanto bɛnɔ. Nya wǝ ni futsyǝ létakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ nya útǝ wǝ kedikɔ ka nkpe dibu kanso kenke. Lǝ nyamfo eso béfo Onanto bɛnɔ, nya bífi mi kusubebe bítǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.
22Nya se bitsyue ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ koto, ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ békpasǝ mi ǝsuǝ biǝ biola mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ esoo, ele bǝ bela mi bǝtsyuǝ itsyi taa mi utu kǝmiǝ ke. 23Onanto ǝtǝ mi nkpǝ fɔfɔ eto businkli kale. Inni utidi wǝ leekpe dísinkli óle mi, bomu nwǝ leenkpe kulefe léle mi ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ditiki nǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa ǝsuǝ. 24Itsyise Anantotiki átɛyi nkǝ,
“Betidi kenke te fe sefa seka.
Nya mǝ kɔlɔkɔ kenke te fe sefa eto efukpokpo seka.
Nya se efukpokpo laaylɔbe kalo kewui.
25Fɛɛ Onanto eto ditiki te lefe saa.”
Ditiki nǝmfo ni Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ bábe letsya bǝtǝ mi nɛ.

Title: 1 PETRO 2
Content:
Bafokanɔfɔ Ni Onanto Eto Betidi Kɛnkɛ.
1Nyaso bisinkli bɛyɛ asa bua saa eto okle buyifo. Bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ sediatɛyitɛyi, ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, kutsyuǝsɛkpɔnkpɔ, ku utidi eto diyebiasǝbiasǝ ǝsuǝ. 2Bela Onanto eto ditiki tinti nǝmǝ fe kase bebisambi laala mmintu kekleke bǝ lǝ bebe bekpe lǝ mi bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ fe kase Onanto laala. 3Itsyise Anantotiki átɛyi nkǝ, “Mi kosate ebunyǝ kase Bonamute nkpe kafo ɛkpɛ.”
4Bibǝ Bonamute ɔflɔ. Wǝ ni nkpǝ eto leba nǝ batonto lɛni bǝ dimbǝ kulesa nti, fɛɛ Onanto ǝlǝkǝ ni utsyǝ nkǝ lefo koya tinti lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi. 5Mi tsya eyifo fe aba nnya nkpe nkpǝ, nyaso bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto lǝ oto lɛwɔnɔ eto diyo. Diyo nǝmfo kafo biɔkɛ fe besumunyǝ kɛnkɛ, nya biɔyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto Lɛwɔnɔ eto kedi ka lɔɔkɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ. 6Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ,
“Nlǝkǝ leba nǝ lefo koya,
nya mimfi ni míntǝkǝ lǝ Sion eto diyo eto kaka nso bofe.
Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ loofo wǝ ɔnɔɔ,
wembudi kofani kulefe.”
7Nya leba nǝmfo áfo koya tinti lǝ mimba lefo wǝ bɛnɔ ɔflɔ, nya lǝ mba dímamfo wǝ banɔ ɔflɔɔ, ele bǝ bate bǝnkǝ, diyifo
“Leba nǝ batonto lɛni bǝ dimbǝ kɔnɔ,
fɛɛ ni bomu díbǝ léfiani leba nǝ léfo koya
lenso kenke nɛ.”
8Nya Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto lekpa ditsyuǝ tsya átɛyi nkǝ,
“Diyifo leba nǝ luutǝ betidi tusǝ,
lǝ ni bedu banɔ.”
Bétusǝ lǝ ni itsyise bámfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bánɔ. Nko ini Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ nkǝ yuubǝ itǝ mǝ nɛ.
9Fɛɛ mii, biyifo betidi ba Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ fe besumunyǝ ba laatɛsɛ wǝ wǝ ni oka, ku kusǝ kenke ko bákpo atsyɔ, Onanto eto betidi ba bǝlǝkǝ bǝtsyǝ bǝ babe Onanto eto eyifosa kplɛ nyamǝ letsya. Nya ókpadi mi utsyiko lǝ ketuntu kamǝ kǝmiǝ óboko wǝ diyǝnde kplɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. 10Lefe ditsyuǝ nǝ léfee, bíenyifo Onanto eto betidi fɛ mɔmɔɔ, biyifo wǝ betidi. Fɛ lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, báante Onanto eto kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ fɛ mɔɔ, biofo wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ.
Bisiǝ Nkpe Bo Lɔɔtɛsǝ Onanto.
11Mɔ balala, nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ fe mba ni bafɔ ku mba nyɛ kusu lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo minkǝ, bilǝkǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ etidisuǝ eto alasa bua nnya nlɛ lema bɔkpɔnko mi lefe saa ǝsuǝ. 12Bisiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ lǝ bamamonyǝ ba nti benkpe bǝ lǝ bédi etiki bua lǝ mi ǝsuǝ bǝ biyifo babuayifo tsyaa, kamaa, lǝ bǝbǝ bǝnyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo kasɛɛ ka bíyifo bítsyǝ itǝ lǝ batɛsǝ Onanto lǝ wǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ nǝmǝ.
13Lǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ esoo, bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ betidi eto aba saa ke bǝtsyǝ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ ku Romafɔ eto Okankplɛ wǝ ni uninǝ kenke, 14ku aba eto bǝnyɛsiǝ ba útǝ ǝsuǝale nkǝ bǝnǝ babuayifo koto nya lǝ batɛsǝ betidi ba leeyifo kasɛɛ tsya. 15Itsyise Onanto aala nkǝ biti mba ini ebukitiki ete beedi eto nyɛ lǝ asa sɛɛ nya bieyifo eso. 16Bisiǝ nkpǝ fe betidi ba nsi lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ biemfi mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ busiǝ bomfo biyifo asa bua. Bomu bisiǝ nkpǝ fe Onanto eto ndomufɔ seka. 17Bitǝ utidi saa dibu. Bela mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ. Bete Onanto sikpi. Nya lǝ bitǝ Okankplɛ tsya dibu.
Bebokosǝ Ǝsuǝ Kasɔ Bitǝ Mi Banamute.
18Mimba ni beyifoyifoo, bebokosǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mi banamute lǝ bibu mǝ tsya. Nya inni banamute ba nkpe kafo ɛkpɛ nya baala mi ete, bomu mba leeyifo mi disiale tsya. 19Lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ kusu ko dimantsyɛ ǝsuǝ fɛ ini lǝ Onanto eto disi eso uńyǝ keklekee, Onanto ebokpo wǝ atsyɔ. 20Lǝ bíyifo kabua nya lǝ nnya eso bǝnǝ mi kotoo, nte atɛsǝ nnya biunyǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Fɛɛ lǝ bíyifo kasɛɛ nya bínyǝ kanyi lǝ ke buyifo esuǝǝ, Onanto ebokpo mi atsyɔ lǝ nnya disi. 21Nya nyamfo ni nnya Onanto lela nkǝ bikeyifo nɛ. Itsyise Kristo kosate ǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ mi disi nya óte mi nkǝ bɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kayɛkɔ.
22“Wényifo lebua saa,
nya wántɛyi sedia saa tsya.”
23Se báka wǝǝ, wánka kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ. Se báte wǝ ohiã wénkudi wǝ balo saa. Bomu úfi lesa saa útǝ Onanto wǝ laakpo lekpo lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ.
24Kristo kosate léfo bo abua útsyi, úsu úkpe lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Úyifo nyamfo nko bǝ lǝ bɔbɔ butsyi lǝ bo abua ǝsuǝ lǝ busiǝ nkpǝ butǝ kasɛyifoyifo. Úfi afabe nnya ófo ótsya mi bufi. 25Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, kɔɔ bíyifo fe basamu ba lénya kusu. Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ákpa mi óboko bǝ bitǝkǝko nwǝ laayɛnko mi ku nwǝ laase mi ɔflɔ.

Title: 1 PETRO 3
Content:
Ele Bǝ Bese Ku Bǝsiǝ Fi Dibu Bǝtǝ Bǝtsyuǝ Lǝ Kristo Eso.
1Nya mi besio tsyaa, nko ele bǝ bebokosǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mi bese. Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ lǝ mǝ utsyuǝ mámfo ɔ́nɔ tsyaa, wuufi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ nǝmǝ eso. Nya inni bǝ ele bǝ bɛtɛyi mǝ kulesa kulaa tsya. 2Bomu mǝ kosate ebunyǝ kase mi ditsyǝbi lekpa nya bébokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ. 3Biǝnlǝkǝ mi bɔnɔbobe bete lǝ asa nnya biakpe nye kase biakle esi nye atsyabi nnya biakpe kefi kalɔkɔsǝ ǝsuǝ. 4Bomuu, bɛlɔkɔsǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ku alɔkɔsǝsa nnya luutǝ bǝ ditsyǝ kpoo nya diyuǝ buɛɛ tsya. Kɔlɔkɔ komfo ambia kulefe nya kofo koya tinti lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. 5Nkomǝ seka besio kɛnkɛ ba dísiǝ kɔ, ba dífi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝkǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝǝ, lébokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ bese nnya iyifo kɔlɔkɔ itǝ mǝ nɛ. 6Nko ke Sara tsya dítsyue Abraham koto nya ókpo wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ onamute.” Mi tsya afiani Sara ǝmfo eto bebisiobi lǝ biyifo asa sɛɛ, nya sikpi laanlɛ mi lǝ kulesa saa ǝsuǝ.
7Nko ke ini itǝ mi bese tsya nɛ, bitǝ lǝ asakasɔnɔnɔ lǝ ɛkɛ lǝ mi ku mi bǝsiǝ nti, binyǝ mǝ fe mba lǝmbǝ ǝsuǝale fe mi. Bitǝ mǝ dibu itsyise mi ku mǝ ta Onanto léfo utǝ nkǝ bibǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ lǝ binyǝ nkpǝ manlo. Lǝ biyifo nkoo, kulesa embuti mi olatoto kusu lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.
Biemfi Lebua Befo Lebua Kayo.
8Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, bitǝ lǝ mimblɛ eto nsusu lǝ buyifo bɔni, utidi eto asa lǝ ɛlɛ mi kaminsǝ, bela bǝtsyuǝ fe bayimi, biyifo kafoɛkpɛ nya lǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ. 9Biemfi lebua befo lebua kayo, nye bukudi lǝ bukidi eto kɛnyɛ. Bomu bɛlɛ Onanto lekpakpa lǝ utǝ mǝ atsyɔkpokpo, itsyise nyamfo Onanto ditsyǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ bibǝ bɛkɛ se ókpadi mi nɛ.
10Fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyii,
“Utsyuǝ saa ke lela nkǝ wǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ unyǝ mu kamini,
nya lǝ usiǝ nkpǝ kɛntsyɛɛ,
wǝǝntǝ lǝ ditiki bua saa lǝ lɛbɔ itsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ
nya yanle bǝ ɔtɛyi sidia tsya.
11Ele bǝ ɔyɛ lebua buyifo lǝ uyifo kasɛɛ,
nya lǝ ɔbɛbɛ diyuǝ ku wǝ utu kenke.
12Itsyise Bonamute ǝǝtǝkǝ ǝnǝ lǝ mba leeyifo kasɛɛ ǝsuǝ,
nya woanɔ mǝ olatoto.
Fɛɛ mba ni babuayifoo, waataka kǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.”
13Lǝ biakplatsya keyifo kasɛɛ, owoe lookpe mi bulǝ? 14Fɛɛ lǝ efe bǝ nyǝ kanyi lǝ kasɛɛ ka feyifo eto disi esoo, nyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Biante mǝ sikpi, nya biǝntǝ kulesa lǝ ilǝ mi. 15Bomu bifi dibu bitǝ Kristo lǝ mi akɔɛsi lǝ bitǝ wǝ dibu fe mi Onamute. Nya biofo mi ǝsuǝ kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝ kate utsyuǝ saa wǝ lela nkǝ woanɔ itsyiko lǝ kusubebe ko ǝsuǝ benkpe. Nya lǝ biyifo nko ku disuǝtsyǝ ku ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝbokosǝ. 16Biyifo nnya ku utu wuee, bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ aka mi lǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ bo binsi lǝ Kristo esoo, lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ mǝ lǝ nnya bátɛyi ǝsuǝ. 17Itsyise ɛlɛkɛ eso bǝ nyǝ kanyi lǝ kasɛɛ ka feeyifo eso lǝ nyamfo eyifo Onanto eto lelabi, enso bǝ lǝ kabua eso. 18Itsyise Kristo wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ, ékpe lǝ betidi ba ni babuayifo eto disi dikpe lɛnwɛ itǝ lefe nǝ kenke, bǝ lǝ ofó bo bokpa kesuko Onanto ɔflɔ. Bálo wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ Onanto lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ átakasǝ wǝ úbǝ nkpǝ. 19Nya lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, úsu óbé Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ letsya útǝ bekpenkpe ba béti bákpe lǝ edi kafo mfó. 20Mbamfó ni betidi ba dímentsyue Onanto eto kɔlɛ koto lǝ lefe nǝ ɔkɛ dibusǝ utǝ mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Noa díkawe wǝ ɔklɔ kplɛ ǝmǝ nɛ. Betidi esiani ba ni mflamfla ba dídufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafoo, mǝ báfo lǝ nkpǝ se ntu bomǝ díyi nɛ. 21Nyamfo eyifo ditsyǝbi nǝ nlɛ bo bote kase ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa lekateko ntuyiyi bomfóo, mɔmɔ laafo bo lǝ nkpǝ. Yenyifo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto keni buflǝ kewui bomuu, iyifo kɛnyɛklekle ku Onanto, kɛnyɛklekle ka lekpa nya ketsyi taa bo akɔɛsi kǝmiǝ ke. Onanto aafo bo lǝ nkpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo eto botaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ kǝbǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ eso. 22Kristo ǝmfo ni nwǝ dísu kato nya unsi lǝ Onanto eto sediani, wǝ nlɛ seka budi lǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke ku kato eto bǝsuǝalenyǝ ku ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe kenke ǝsuǝ.

Title: 1 PETRO 4
Content:
Bisiǝ Nkpe Fe Bafokanɔfɔ Seka.
1Nyaso se Kristo dínyǝ kanyi lǝ sinǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, mi tsya fi wǝ nsusu bomfo ke eto okle bekpé mi ǝsuǝ nkɛale, itsyise utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ensifi ǝsuǝ kakpé lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. 2Lǝ nyaso idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, bisiǝ mi nkpǝ fɛfɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkuɛ ǝsuǝ. 3Kɔɔ bísiǝ nkpǝ bíyifo asa fe bamamonyǝ ɛklɛ tinti. Nkpe bo bísiǝ lǝ lefe nǝmfó áyɛ lǝ setsyetɔ eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, sitekpe, sidikpũũ, budi ku bunǝ eto ake eti susu ku sifiǝsumu eto eyifosa ǝsuǝ. 4Nya se biensiankɔ ani ku mǝ keyifo mǝ eyifosa kpǝ nnya lǝmbǝ kasɔnɔnɔ esoo, yeeyifo mǝ yanii nya baaka mi. 5Fɛɛ yuubǝ ibǝ bǝ buulǝkǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto wǝ lookponko mba nsi nkpǝ ku bekpenkpe akpo. 6Nyamfo eso Kristo ábe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bǝtǝ bekpenkpe tsya, ite bǝ Onanto ákponko mǝ lekpo fe kase baakponko utidinini saa lekpo tsyaa, bǝ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ fe kase Onanto nsi seka.
Ele Bǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Kenke Kawunsǝko Bǝtsyuǝ.
7Asa nnya kenke eto kalosǝkɔ boyo elo. Nyaso bińyǝ bikabe kusu lǝ bɛlɛ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ, bǝ lǝ befo ola boto. 8Fɛɛ nnya nso bofe enso kenke ni bǝ bikala bǝtsyuǝ kafo faa. Itsyise lelabi ǝǝtǝkǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto kabua kpǝ ka uyifo kato. 9Befo mi bayimitsyuǝ kafo faa, bɔwɔnɔnɔ saa mankɛ. 10Mi nti eto utsyuǝ saa áfo ǝtǝsa ate ate itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Nya fe unyɛsiǝ sɛɛ saa wǝ laalɛ ǝtǝsa ate ate nyamfo ola kǝtǝ Onantoo, biyifo ǝtǝsa nyamfo eto keyifo, bǝ lǝ ibǝ kutǝkǝ itǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ. 11Lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ Anantotiki budii, udi nnya fe kase Onanto dítǝ wǝ nkǝ udi nnya utǝ betidi. Nya lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ kesumu eto keyifoo, uyifo ke ku ǝsuǝale nnya Onanto dífi útǝ wǝ nkǝ uyifo ke ǝsuǝ, itǝ lǝ befi atɛsǝ bǝtǝ Onanto lefe saa ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo, wǝ eto ale ni diyǝnde ku ǝsuǝalǝ idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.
Binyǝ Kanyi Fe Kristo Seka.
12Mɔ bayimi lala, kase banlɛ mi boto kabe bɛnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ keklekee, yenyifo mi naa bǝnkǝ lesa nǝ bɛnnlɛ kusi bobe kǝtǝǝ, mǝǝmbǝ tɔ lǝ kutsyuǝ saa ǝsuǝ inyǝ. 13Bomu lǝ nyamfo esoo, binyǝ disuǝnyuǝ bǝ mi tsya lɛ kanyi bunyǝ fe Kristo ke seka, bǝ lǝ ɔbɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, mi tsya ebofo disuǝnyuǝ bunyǝ kato keyuluu. 14Binyǝ disuǝnyuǝ lǝ betidi áka mi se bintǝkǝko Kristo eso. Itsyise diyǝnde eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ni Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ siko mi. 15Lǝ mi utsyuǝ ǝǝnyǝ kanyii, yenyifo bǝ uyifo uwudifɔ, uyu, obuayifo, nye nwǝ laakpe ditiki nǝ dimanle wǝ kɛnyɛ eso. 16Fɛɛ lǝ biǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ mi bafokanɔfɔ esoo, biǝntǝ lǝ ɛlɛ mi kofani. Bomu bǝsɔ Onanto ani bǝ Kristo eto diye teke fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. 17Lefe nǝmǝ eboyo elo bǝ betsyiko lekpokponkpo nǝmǝ kasɔ, nya Onanto eto betidi ǝsuǝ yuutsyǝ kasɔ itsyiko. Lǝ betsyiko kasɔ itsyi lǝ bo ǝsuǝǝ, ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ mba dímamfo Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ banɔ? 18Bawɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue bǝnkǝ,
“Lǝ ite mǝǝ, bǝ yɔɔkɛ ale fɛ betidi sɛɛ lǝ bǝnyǝ bofoo,
ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ babuayifo ba dímamfo banɔ?”
19Lǝ nyasoo, mba lǝǝnyǝ kanyi ka diyifo Onanto eto lelabii, lǝ mǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ befi mǝ ǝsuǝ bakpe lǝ nwǝ díyifo mǝ lǝ kɔni kenke, nwǝ leeyifo lefe saa lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ.

Title: 1 PETRO 5
Content:
Bikalɛ Onanto Eto Bebi Ola.
1Mɔ kosate nwǝ ni bafokanɔfɔ eto uninǝ lǝ mi ntii, nla miǝ maalɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto beninǝ ba nkpe mi lenti kɔlɛ. Mɔ kosate ǝnyǝ kase Kristo dínyǝ kanyi, nya lǝ bǝlǝkǝ wǝ batee, muunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ kǝmiǝ. Nla miǝ maatɛyi mi minkɛ, 2bɛlɛ Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ béfi bákpe mi lǝ kɔni bǝ bebe ola ku kafo faa, fe kase Onanto lɛtɔ utsyiko mi ɔflɔ. Bienyifo keyifo kamfo bǝ lǝ bifi bɛbɛbɛ kutǝkǝ ko dimǝnńyǝ itǝ, bomu biyifo ke ku kesumu seka. 3Bienyifo ke bidi sɛkplɛ lǝ mba béfi bákpe mi kalɔ ǝsuǝ, bomu bete ditsyǝbi sɛɛ itǝ basamu eto etsyukpa nnya nkpe mi kalɔ. 4Nya lefe nǝ Kristo, Nwǝ Laayɛnko Basamu eto Uninǝ Kenke luubǝǝ, lǝ uti mi lekankpakpa kosate nǝmǝ, nǝ ni nǝ laambia kulefe.
5Nko ke ini itǝ mi lekososa tsya nɛ, bǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bafokanɔfɔ ninǝ ba eto kalɔ benkpe. Mimblɛ kenke bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ. Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ,
“Onanto ǝǝńyǝ lǝ mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ǝsuǝ,
fɛɛ woawunsǝko mba laabokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.”
6Nyaso beboksǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bɛkɛ lǝ Onanto eto kɔni kekleke komǝ kalɔ, bǝ lǝ obesǝ mi kato lǝ wǝ lefe sɛɛ ǝsuǝ. 7Bifi mi asa nnya kenke laakpé mi bulǝ bekpe lǝ Onanto eto ani, itsyise wǝ laalɛ mi ola.
8Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ, bisiǝ bikabe kusu. Mi olo Obonsam lɛ botsyilama kafa, kato ɔkɔɛ fe tsyata, nya ɔnlɛ utidi bɔbɛbɛ nkǝ lǝ usǝnsǝ ɔyimi. 9Bifi bofokanɔ kekleke bińyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, se binyi biǝ mi bayimi bafokanɔfɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke tsya kpé lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ kamfo ke eto okle ǝsuǝ.
10Fɛ lǝ binyǝ kanyi kamfo itǝ lefe kliminti kamaa, Onanto, nwǝ eto lefonǝ lǝmbǝ kalokɔ, wǝǝ lékpadi mi nkǝ bibǝ binyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde manlo nǝ diyifo lɔni ku Kristoo, wǝ kosate ǝbɔflɔsǝ mi, okpe mi nkǝ ale lǝ binyǝ kekleke. 11Wǝ ni ǝsuǝale idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.
Bokla Fɛfɛ
12Nlɛ kukue kliminti komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ Silvano wǝ mimfi fe ɔyimi wǝ lefo ɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nla miǝ maakpe mi nkɛale ku nnya mɔ kosate dínyǝ miǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ kosate nǝmǝ ni nǝmfo. Nyaso bińyǝ kekleke lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.
13Mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ ba tsya Onanto dílǝkǝ lǝ Babilonia eto kasɔ ku mɔ ubi Marko bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o. 14Bɛbuta bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bisiǝsǝ bǝtsyuǝ ku bafokanɔfɔ eto lelabi.
Diyuǝsǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ ba kenke diyifo bani ku Kristo.

Title: 2 PETRO 1
Content:
1Mɔ, Simon Petro, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto uyifoyifo ku ɔtɔnkpe, mɔ ni nwǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mimba ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto ku Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo eto kasɛyifoyifo ǝsuǝǝ, dítǝ bínyǝ bofokanɔ bo lefo koya fe bo bole bomfo eto okle.
2Onanto lǝ usi unǝ mi kafo eso mmǝ, nya lǝ utǝ mi diyuǝ kpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ mi Onanto ǝmǝ ku Bonamute Yesu eto bote ǝsuǝ eso.
Kase Onanto Lékpadi Nya Úlǝkǝ Betidi.
3Onanto éfi wǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝale útǝ bo lesa saa nǝ loofe itǝ bo faa lǝ bo nkpǝ ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ bofó nkpǝ busiǝ fe bafokanɔfɔ. Úyifo nyamfo itsyise buyi wǝ nwǝ lékpadi bo nkǝ bunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ kosate eto diyǝnde ku kasɛɛ kǝmiǝ. 4Onanto áyɛ lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝ útǝ bo ǝtǝsa kpaa nnya lefo koya, nnya eto kɛnyɛ útsyǝ bo, bǝ lǝ bofó bɔyɛ lǝ ǝtǝsa nyamfo ǝsuǝ bulǝkǝ bo ǝsuǝ butsyiko lǝ asa bua nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkɔɛ kabiasɛ wǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ǝsuǝ. Bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bubǝ bofiani mba luunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ Onanto eto ditsyǝbi nǝmǝ kǝmiǝ.
5Lǝ nsusu sɛɛ bomfo ǝsuǝ esoo, bekpe otsyekle saa biofó lǝ bifi kasɛyifoyifo bɛwunsǝko ku mi bofokanɔ. Nya lǝ bifi kobetete bɛkɔ lǝ kasɛyifoyifo ǝsuǝ. 6Nya lǝ bifi ǝsuǝkatotǝkǝtǝkǝ bɛwunsǝko kobetete, lǝ bifi utukpekpe bɛwunsǝko ǝsuǝkatotǝkǝtǝkǝ, lǝ bifi Onanto sikpitete bɛwunsǝko utukpekpe. 7Sɛyimila wunsǝko Onanto sikpitete, nya lǝ lelabi lǝ lɛwunsǝko sɛyimila. 8Ǝtsyǝbi nyamfo lefe itǝ mi nɛ nya lǝ nyamblɛ kenke aka mi kɔni nya yefo disiǝ isiǝ lǝ mii, yuutǝ mi eyifosa ebokpa wuee, nya yɔɔbɔ kutǝkǝ se binyi Bonamute Yesu Kristo eso. 9Nya lǝ utsyuǝ ǝmbǝ ditsyǝbi nǝmfoo, nyalɛ utidi ǝmfo ǝnnyǝ asa kukɔnɔ, eso weemunyǝ asa lǝ katsyontsyokɔ. Itǝ bǝ ótasuǝ nkǝ Onanto ǝflǝ abua nnya úyifo kɔ bewui.
10Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, bekplatsya lǝ bińyǝ kekleke eso kɔ, itǝ lǝ Onanto eto bokpadi bo ókpadi mi nya úlǝkǝ mii, menyifo ebimbale, nya lǝ biyifo nkoo, nyafɛ biemubǝ kama lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nɛ. 11Lǝ biyifo nkoo, biunyǝ kusu wuee bidufǝ Bonamute ku Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo eto seka kedikɔ manlo siamǝ ǝsuǝ.
12Ite bǝ bíyi nyamfo koko nya bíkabɔ keyudu lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, nyifo nnya minkǝ muukaklomasǝ mi asa nyamfo lefe saa. 13Nya se minsi minkpe nkpǝ koo, yɔɔlɛkɛ bǝ nkaklomasǝ mi asa nyamfo nya lǝ nkasanklisǝ mi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. 14Nyi minkǝ ibu sɛkɛ lǝ mbɔ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ siamfo ǝsuǝ fe kase Bonamute Yesu Kristo lɛtɛyi mɛ okpasǝ. 15Mɔɔbɛbɛ kusu saa ko ǝsuǝ biokakloma asa nyamfo lefe saa lǝ mɔ ukpǝ kama ntsyǝ.
Bo Kosate Ǝnyǝ Yesu Eto Diyǝnde Nǝmǝ Ku Bo Ǝnǝmi.
16Etiki nnya bɔ́tɛyi mi itsyi lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto businkli kǝbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, menyifo etiki woenwoe. Bo kosate dínyǝ wǝ ku bo ǝnǝmi lǝ wǝ sɛkplɛ ǝsuǝ. 17Búńyǝ mfó lǝ lefe nǝ Anto Onanto dífi dibu ku diyǝnde útǝ wǝ. Nya ɔkɔɛ lɛbɔ útsyi diyǝnde kenke eto Onanto ɔflɔ nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyǝ nwǝmfo ni mɔ ubi lala, wǝ ǝsuǝ mǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ nɛ.” 18Bo kosate lɛnɔ ɔkɔɛ ǝmfo lɛbɔ utsyi kato, lǝ lefe nǝ bɔ́kɛ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ lǝ kɔtini kɛnkɛ komǝ ǝsuǝ.
19Nyamfo eso busi bófo Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi eto etiki nnya bábe letsya bǝtsyǝ enso nɛ. Bekplatsya lǝ bɛlɛ letsyabebe nǝmǝ fe okandiɛ wǝ nlɛ buyǝnde lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ, isu ese lǝ kolensiǝnto ko kalesiǝsiǝ eto sefandebi luubɛ siyǝnde lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ. 20Lesa nǝ lefe ele bǝ binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo ni bǝnkǝ, kuutsyuǝ saa antaka mmǝ ete ulǝkǝ Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ ka nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ wǝ kosate eto kobetete ǝsuǝ. 21Itsyise Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ eto ditiki saa méntsyi lǝ utidi kuutsyuǝ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ díbǝ. Bomu Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lɛyɛ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ bátɛyi kɛnyɛ ka ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ kǝbǝ bǝtsyǝ.

Title: 2 PETRO 2
Content:
Petro Álɛ Bafokanɔfɔ Kɔlɛ Lǝ Bidiabidia Eto Bateasa Ǝsuǝ.
1Fe kase bidiabidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛkɛ lǝ betidi nti kɔɔ, nko ke bidiabidia eto bateasa lɔɔbɔ bakɛ mi lenti nɛ. Bɔɔyɛ lǝ awɛsu bate bidiabidia eto asa nnya laabiasǝ betidi eto bofokanɔ. Nya bɔɔni Bonamute wǝ dílǝkǝ mǝ kulaa tsya. Mǝ eyifosa nyamfo ebutǝ batsylɔsǝ ǝsuǝ mlǝ. 2Betidi kpǝ ebutǝkǝko mǝ nkpǝ bua siǝsiǝ kama, nya lǝ bateasa eto eyifosa esoo, betidi ebɔtɛyi asa bua bǝńyǝ lǝ kɔnukualɛsu komǝ ǝsuǝ. 3Se bateasa bamǝ dífi kǝnǝnsɛ bǝtǝkǝ lǝ atabi bɔbɛbɛ ǝsuǝ esoo, boowoe etiki nnya ni bidiabidia befi bǝnyǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ, Onanto ébolo mǝ dikpi koko, nya úkǝmuǝ utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ mǝ bɔtsylɔsǝ!
4Onanto mémfi ɔ́tsyɛ wǝ batɔnkpe ba léta wǝ bebu. Bomu okpé mǝ lǝ amana óto mǝ ókpe lǝ ute kǝmiǝ lǝ kaka lena tũũ isu ese lefe nǝ okponko mǝ lekpo. 5Nko ke Onanto dímǝnyǝ betidi ba dísiǝ nkpǝ kɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ǝsuǝ kaminsǝ se báni nkpǝ sɛɛ busiɛ eso. Bǝntǝ Onanto dibu esoo, útǝ ɔsɔmi áni nya ntu díyi bófo kawunsiǝ kenke nya betidi lɛtsylɔ. Ini Noah wǝ lébe nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ letsya útǝ betidi bamǝ ku bitidi ekuanse bamba ba Onanto dílǝkǝ hã díbu.
6Onanto álo Sodom ku Gomora dikpi nya útǝ ute lɛtsylɔsǝ imǝnkplɛ inuǝ nyamfó kenke káfiani ntɔ, úfi óte lesa nǝ luutu betidi ba lɛni bǝ bembufi dibu bǝtǝ wǝ. 7Onanto ǝlǝkǝ Lot wǝ ni utidi sɛɛ, nwǝ betidi bamfó eto nkpǝ bua siǝsiǝ díkelǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. 8Utidi sɛɛ ǝmfo ákɛ lǝ mǝ nti lefe saa. Ɔ́nɔ nnya kenke nlɛ bubǝ, nya únyǝ nnya ku wǝ ǝnǝmi tsya, itǝ bǝ betidi bamfó eto nkpǝ bua siǝsiǝ bomǝ ǝkǝlǝ wǝ tinti lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. 9Nyamfo lɛ bote kase Boanto laafo betidi sɛɛ bulǝkǝ ketsyiko lǝ botokabe bo ǝsuǝ bankpe ku kase waalɔ babuayifo kǝtsyǝ itǝ lefe nǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ looyo itǝ mǝ kotonǝnǝ.
10Nya mba wuunǝ koto enso ni mba lǝǝtǝkǝko ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ biabia eto nkpǝsiasiǝ kama nya baani beentsyue Onanto eto afi koto. Bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo kpé ale nya bembu kulesa ku diyǝnde eto ǝsuǝalǝ nnya nkpe kato bomuu, baaka mǝ kulaa tsya. 11Fɛɛ Onanto eto batɔnkpe ba nkpe ǝsuǝalǝ nya bankpe kɛnyɛale banso bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo kulaa tsya anla ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe kato kɛnyɛ, kaaka mǝ lǝ Boanto eto ǝnǝmi. 12Betidi bamfo eto okle te fe bebutubuki ba lenyi kobe ba boofo bumuǝ kalo, nya bǝǝńyǝ lǝ lesa saa nǝ bannɔ kasɔ ǝsuǝ nya beedi etiki bua saa eto okle. Bɔɔtsylɔsǝ mǝ fe kase baalo bebutubuki seka.
13Boonyǝ kanyi fe kase bǝtǝ betidi dínyǝ kanyi ke. Beedi nkpe keyifo lesa saa nǝ ke baala lǝ nkɔminti tsya itsyise beefi nnya fe lesa nǝ lookpe mǝ disuǝyuǝ. Beyifo mba leeyifo afanisa ku mba leeyifo asa nnya laannɔ bobe. Baakɔ ku mi mba nlɛ eyi budi nya bǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ mǝ asa bua nnya beeyifo ǝsuǝ. 14Bakpé disǝnkpo eto ǝnǝmi nya beeyifo lebua lefe saa nya yennlǝ mǝ. Baawɛ betidi ba eto bofokanɔ lǝmbǝ ale kakpe lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ. Mǝ ketu emmi kulefe. Onanto ékudi betidi bamfo sitinti! 15Báyani kususɛ bǝtsyǝ nya bánya kusu! Bǝǝtǝnko Onanto eto unyǝlǝkǝtidi Baalam wǝ ni Boer eto ubi eto ditsyǝbi kama. Waala atabi nnya wuunyǝ lǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. 16Lǝ nyaso Onanto ǝyǝnki ókpe wǝ lǝ lebua nǝ úyifo ǝsuǝ. Wǝ Baalam kosate eto ɔflimu édi wǝ etiki lǝ utidi eto ɔkɔɛ ǝsuǝ nya úti wǝ kusu lǝ disibiabia eto asa nnya ɔnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ.
17Betidi bamfo eyifo fe etubiǝ nnya lensianyifǝ ntu, fe asɔmiloku nnya ufiebi lekpa ɔnyɛko. Onanto ébu kǝsiǝkɔ utsyǝ mbamfo eto okle lǝ ketuntu tũũ kǝmiǝ. 18Beedi etiki bimba kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato. Nya beedi akɔɛntiki nnya laabiasǝ utidi ǝsuǝ, kawɛ mba nlɛ bɔbɔ lǝ betidi ba nsi nkpǝ bua ǝsuǝ eto nti kakpe. 19Bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo ǝǝtsyǝ mǝ kɛnyɛ bǝnkǝ bootǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ buusiǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe mǝ kosate nsi nkpǝ bo loobiasɛ mǝ bafiani ndomufɔ, itsyise lesa nǝ eto kalɔ fankpee, aafiani ni ndomunyǝ.
20Lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ bate Bonamute Yesu Kristo wǝ ni Ofomfokǝtǝǝ, nya bǝnǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝlǝkǝ lǝ asa nnya laanansǝ etidisuǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo, nya yanklɛ fɛ asa nyamǝ disinkli ibǝ imuǝ mǝ itǝkǝ mǝ katoo, bǝǝbǝ kǝsiǝ nkpǝ bo lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, laabia kaso mbo bǝsiǝ kɔ. 21Lǝ nnya ete betidi bamfo dímante kulesa itsyi lǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝǝ, eni ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mǝ, eso bǝ lǝ bate kusu sɛɛ komǝ fɛ lǝ besinkli lǝ kɔfi kɛnkɛ ko Onanto lékpe mǝ eto kama.
22Lesa nǝ díbǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ete wuee lesa nǝ akpa nyamfo nlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝ, “Okpa esinkli ɔlɛ wǝ kala budi,” nya “Okplako wǝ bǝflǝsǝ ntu kukɔnɔ esinkli úsu ɔlɛ kota boke.”

Title: 2 PETRO 3
Content:
Bińyǝ Bikabe Kusu Itǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo Eto Businkli Kǝbǝ.
1Mɔ bayimi lala, nyamfo ni kukue nuǝfǝ ko minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi nɛ. Lǝ ekue ǝnuǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nkplatsya miǝ lǝ nsi nnǝ mi nsusu nsuko asa sɛɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝ lǝ ekpako mi wuee. 2Nla miǝ lǝ nklomasǝ mi etiki nya Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mǝ, ku lesa nǝ batɔnkpe bamǝ lété mi itsyi lǝ Bonamute we ni Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.
3Tutɛɛ, bitǝ lǝ ekpako mi wuee biǝ, lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ebubǝ ba difi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto afanisa yifoyifo. Boomǝ mi. 4Nya bɔɔtɔ mi bǝnkǝ, “Nwǝ dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ ɔlɛ bubǝ nkpǝ, sieti onkpe? Itsyise idu lefe nǝ bo bana mǝ díkpe ibǝ ese mmi, nko ete asa nsi nte fe kase itsyǝ taa lefe nǝ Onato díyifo kawunsiǝ nɛ.” 5Beyi fɛ betsyǝ báni ɔnukualɛ mǝ bǝ etiki te Onanto didi nya úyifo kato ku kasɔ. Wǝ ke dítǝ kasɔ lɛbɔ ketsyi lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ nya kabɔ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ kankpe. 6Nya ɛyɛ lǝ ntuyiyi ǝsuǝ nya Onanto lɛtsylɔsǝ kawunsiǝ ka kɔ kenke. 7Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ ke dimuǝ kato ku kasɔ kanlɛ nya ɔnlɛ ke bɔlɔ kǝtsyǝ itǝ ke botonsǝ. Ɔ́lɔ mǝ utsyǝ itǝ diyi nǝ wookponko betidi ba laante Onanto lekpo batsylɔsɛ mǝ.
8Mɔ bayimi lala, bianta ǝsuǝ biǝnkǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmii, letekɛkɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ diyi lɔni ku alɛ kɔkpi eto nti. Lǝ wǝ ɔflɔɔ, nyamblɛ akate iyifo ani. 9Lǝ bǝtsyuǝ eto nsusu ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto annlɛ bɔkɔse lǝ kɛnyɛ ka utsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Inni nko ini. Bomu ɔlɛ ǝsuǝ butsyǝ ku mi itsyise waanla nkǝ batsylɔsǝ kuutsyuǝ saa. Fɛɛ ola nkǝ utsyuǝ saa tsyi ɔwuninsǝ lǝ ɔyɛ abua buyifo.
10Fɛɛ Bonamute eto diyi nǝmǝ ebubǝ fe kase uyu lǝǝbǝ. Diyi nǝmfoo, lǝ ɔkɔɛ kɛnɛnɛnɛ eto bɔbɔ ketsyi kato ǝsuǝ asa nnya nkpe kato ebonya. Nya asa nnya nkpe kato kenke looto ɛtsylɔ nya asa nnya kenke nkpe lǝ kasɔ loonya.
11Se asa nyamfo kenke loobia mmǝǝ, nte betidi ba eto okle ele bǝ bidi? Ele bǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ bo diyifo kɛnkɛ lǝ bifi ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto. 12Nya lǝ kase binsi bǝnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ Onanto eto diyi nǝmǝ bekplatsya lǝ dibǝ mlǝ. Diyi nǝmfoo, kato kenke looto katsylɔ, nya ute loolonsǝ kato eto ǝsuǝale kenke ebiasǝ. 13Fɛɛ boo, buunyǝ bukabe kusu itǝ Onanto eto kɛnyɛ ka úsyǝ. Kato fɔfɔ ku kasɔ fɔfɔ ka luubǝ kaka kasɛyifoyifo sɔ̃ɔ̃ lɔɔkɛ mfó kenke.
14Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, se bífi mi kusubebe kenke bítǝkǝ lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, bekplatsya lǝ biyifo mi ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ, kabua saa mankɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi, lǝ bɛkɛ lɛ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ. 15Ele bǝ bifi kase Bonamute dífi dibusǝ útǝǝ, fe kusu ko útǝ mi nkǝ lǝ bafo mi lǝ binyǝ bulǝkǝ fe kase bo ɔyimi lala Paulo lɛwɔni útǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ kobe ko Onanto dítǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. 16Nyamfo ni lesa nǝ waatɛyi lǝ wǝ ekue nnya kenke waawɔni katsyese mi lǝ etiki nyamfo ǝsuǝ nɛ. Asa ǝtsyuǝ nnya waawɔni katsyese kpé ale nyaso betidi ba lenyi ku mba lǝnńyǝ kekleke lǝ mǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, eefi kasɔlǝkǝlǝkǝ ka dimamflɔ kǝtǝ nnya fe kase beeyifo lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto nlebe ntsyuǝ. Nyamfo luutǝ baatsylɔsǝ ǝsuǝ nɛ.
17Fɛɛ, mɔ balala, bifi biyi nyamfo koko. Nyaso bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ bǝ babuatidi saa embɔwɛ mi bakpe lǝ mǝ abuayifoyifo saa ku mǝ esubuayɛyɛ ǝsuǝ. Manla miǝ lǝ beta bibu lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ! 18Bomu bisukosǝ lǝ bebe lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ eto bote ǝsuǝ. Wǝ boǝtǝ dibu idu mɔmɔ isu manlo manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 1
Content:
Onanto Eto Nkpǝ Eto Ditiki Ni Yesu Kristo.
1Bɔlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, ko nyɛ lǝ Nkpe eto ditiki nǝ nsi nkpǝ itsyi ta kawunsiǝ eto ketsyikokɔ ke ǝsuǝ. Bɔ́nɔ etiki itsyi lǝ ni ǝsuǝ nya búkǝnyǝ ni ku bo ǝnǝmi tsya. Sitinti ini bǝ búnyǝ ni ku bo ǝnǝmi nya búkǝtidi ni ku bo ani tsya. 2Se Onanto dílǝkǝ ditiki nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ le lekpelee, búnyǝ wǝ nya búdi etiki itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bóbe letsya lǝ nkpǝ manlo bo nkpe lǝ wǝ, nya onkpe lǝ Anto Onanto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ. Nya Onanto dílǝkǝ wǝ óte bo tsya. 3Lesa nǝ búkǝnyǝ nya bɔ́nɔɔ, ni bɔnlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi nɛ, bǝ lǝ mi tsya lǝ bibǝ bɛkɔ ku bo lǝ lɔniyifoyifo nǝ ǝsuǝ bonkpe ku Anto ǝmǝ ku wǝ ubi Yesu Kristo. 4Nyaso bɔnlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, bǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝ bɔnlɛ bunyǝǝ, lǝ lɛflɔ lelo.
Onanto Ni Diyǝnde.
5Mɔmɔɔ, ditiki nǝ bɔ́nɔ butsyiko lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ ɔflɔ nya búfi ni bɔnlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi ni nkǝ Onanto ni diyǝnde, nya ketuntu saa lǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ. 6Nyaso lǝ bɔlɛ bɔtɛyi boǝ buyifo bani ku wǝ, fɛ busi bunsi nkpǝ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bɔlɛ sidia bɔtɛyi lǝ bo etiki ku lǝ bo eyifosa ǝsuǝ. 7Fɛɛ lǝ busi nkpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ fe kase unsi lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ ete bǝ busi lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku bo bayimitsyuǝ. Nya Yesu Kristo wǝ ni wǝ Ubi eto kɔtɔ ǝflǝ lebua saa lebua lǝ bo ǝsuǝ kúwi.
8Lǝ bɔ́tɛyi boǝ lebua saa ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ, bɔ́wɛ ǝsuǝ nya bɔnnlɛ ɔnukualɛ bɔtɛyi. 9Fɛɛ lǝ bulǝkǝ bo abua kasɔ butǝ Onantoo, wɔɔyɛ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ uyifo lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ utǝ bo, wuufi bo abua ɔtsyɛ bo, uflǝ nnya uwui lǝ bo. 10Fɛɛ lǝ bɔni boǝ lebua saa mbǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bútǝkǝ Onanto sidia, nya wǝ ditiki ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 2
Content:
Yesu Kristo Eyifo Bo Ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ.
1Mɔ bebi lala, nlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi bǝ lǝ bienyifo lebua. Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ éyifo lebuaa, bokpé utsyuǝ wǝ lǝǝńyǝ lǝ bo kɛnyɛ kalɛ Onanto lekpakpa kǝtǝ bo. Wǝ ni Yesu Kristo wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ ǝmǝ. 2Nya Kristo kosate ni nwǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto laayɛ kefi bo abua katsyɛ bo. Inni bo mate eto ale ete woefi katsyɛ, bomu kawunsiǝ kenke eto betidi eto ale.
3Lǝ butsyue Onanto eto afi kotoo, eté bǝ buyi wǝ. 4Lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyi wǝ,” fɛɛ woenyifo lǝ wǝ afi ǝsuǝǝ, utsyuǝ ǝmfo eyifo odia. Nya ɔnukualɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ. 5Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke leetsyue wǝ ditiki koto, wǝ lelabi itǝ Onanto ni nǝ lɛflɔ nɛ. Bitǝ lǝ ntɛyi mi kase boate boǝ buyifo bani ku Onanto nya ni benkǝ, 6utsyuǝ saa ke laatɛyi nkǝ uyifo ɔni ku Onanto, ele bǝ usiǝ nkpǝ fe kase Yesu Kristo dísiǝ.
Ele Bǝ Siǝ Nkpe Lǝ Diyǝnde Ǝsuǝ.
7Mɔ balala, nnya minlɛ bɔwɔni katsyese mi enni kɔfi fɔfɔ. Bomu kɔfi koko ko nte taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke. Kɔfi koko komfo eyifo nko fákanɔ taa kɔ. 8Fɛɛ kɔfi ko minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi mfoo, lǝ sitinti kuyifo kɔfɔfɔ itsyise ko ɔnukualɛ yɛ lǝ Kristo ku mi tsya ǝsuǝ. Itsyise ketuntu kamǝ lɛ bofe nya diyǝnde nǝmǝ kosate fe lɛlɛ buyǝnde.
9Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laatɛyi nkǝ okpé lǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ fɛ weekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, si okpé lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ ibǝ ese mɔmɔ. 10Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laala wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, kpé lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ, nya kulesa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ nǝ luutǝ bǝ utsyuǝ bamba dufǝ lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ. 11Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ leekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, kpé lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ, nya ɔnyɛ lǝ ke kǝmiǝ. Nya unyi kaka ɔntɔ, itsyise ketuntu kamǝ ǝtǝ óba ǝnǝmi.
12Mɔ bebi lala, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi
lǝ bete biǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto éfi mi abua ɔtsyɛ mi.
13Antomǝ, mi minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ nɛ
itsyise biyi Kristo wǝ nsi nkpǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ǝmǝ.
Nya nko ǝmǝ ke minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi bakosobi nɛ itsyise bítǝkǝ Obuale ǝmǝ tsya kato.
14Nya mi, mɔ bebi lala,
nlɛ mi kukue komfo bɔwɔni itsyise biyi Anto ǝmǝ.
Mi antomǝ, mi minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ
itsyise biyi Kristo wǝ nsi nkpǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ǝmǝ.
Nya mi bakosobi, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ
itsyise bekpé ǝsuǝale,
nya Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ mi
nya bíkǝtǝkǝ Obuale ǝmǝ kato.
15Biemfi lelabi bitǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo nye kulesa nǝ nkpe lǝ ke, itsyise utsyuǝ saa ke laala kawunsiǝ kamfoo, anla Anto ǝmǝ. 16Lesa saa nǝ ni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto lele ni fe asa bua nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkɔɛ, asa bua nnya betidi lǝǝnyǝ nya nnya akɛ mǝ ɔkɔɛ ku lesa saa nǝ nkpe lǝ kawunsiǝ nǝ ǝsuǝ utidi laabesǝ ǝsuǝ katoo, nyamfo eto kuditsyuǝ mentsyi Anto ǝmǝ flɔ. Bomu nyamblɛ etsyi kawunsiǝ mfo. 17Kawunsiǝ kamfo ku kǝ asa nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkɔɛɛ, ǝbǝ ɛlɛ bofe. Fɛɛ nwǝ leeyifo lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, ebusiǝ nkpǝ lefe saa.
Mimblɛ Kenke Yi Onanto Eto Ditiki Nǝmǝ Kosate.
18Mɔ bebi lala, kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kalosǝkɔ eboyo kalo! Nya fe kase bátɛyi mii, bíɔnɔ biǝ Kristo eto olo ǝmǝ ébubǝ, nya mɔmɔɔ, Kristo eto balo kpǝ ébubɛ bakpe. Nyaso buyi boǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalosǝkɔ ebɔfi. 19Lǝ sitintii, betidi bamfo ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ditsyukpa nǝmfo ǝsuǝ, nyaso bábɔ bo lǝ nti nɛ. Lǝ bo betidi kosate benii, eni besi bakpé lǝ bo nti. Fɛɛ mǝ budu lǝ bo nti lɛ bote nkǝ mǝ nti eto kuutsyuǝ menyifo bo ole.
20Fɛ mii, Kristo éfi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝmǝ ókpé mi lǝ ǝsuǝ, nya mimblɛ kenke nyi ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ. 21Inni lǝ kase binnyi ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ eso minlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi, bomu se binyi ni eso. Nya binyi tsya biǝ sidia saa eni Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.
22Nya owoe ni odia ǝmǝ? Odia ǝmǝ ni nwǝ lɛni nkǝ Yesu eni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Utidi ǝmfo eto okle tututu ni Kristo eto olo nɛ. Nya wǝ ni nwǝ lɛni Onanto ku wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ nɛ. 23Itsyise nwǝ ke lɛni Ubi ǝmfo áni Anto ǝmǝ tsya. Nwǝ ke léfo Ubi ǝmǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, áfo Anto ǝmǝ tsya.
24Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ ditiki nǝ béfo idu taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ eyo mɔmɔɔ, edufǝ mi lǝ akɔɛsi kenke. Nya lǝ bɛlɛ nnya kukɔnɔɔ, nyalɛ biusiǝ nkpǝ lǝ Ubi ǝmǝ ku Anto ǝmǝ eto lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ lefe saa. 25Nya nkpǝ manlo bomfo ni kɛnyɛ ka Kristo dítsyǝ nkǝ wuufi utǝ bo nɛ.
26Nlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi itsyi lǝ betidi ba loola bǝ baawɛ mi bakpé eso. 27Fɛ mimii, Kristo eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ókpo lǝ mi ǝsuǝǝ, áfo disiǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ kenke. Lǝ nyasoo, yensife bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ usi ote mi kulesa bio. Itsyise wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ aate mi lesa saa. Nya asa nnya diate eyifo ɔnukualɛ nya sidia saa lǝmbǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bitsyue koto lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ léte mi lǝ bisiǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo ǝsuǝ.
28Nko ini nɛ, mɔ bebi lala, biyifo lɔni ku Kristo bǝ lǝ lefe nǝ ɔɔbɔ ubǝǝ, biofo bɔbɔ kǝńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi ku utu wuee kofanimante lǝ Diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. 29Lǝ biyi biǝ Kristo eyifo ɔsɛɛ, ele bǝ befo bɛnɔ biǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo asa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ, eyifo Onanto eto ubi.

Title: 1 YOHANES 3
Content:
Buyifo Onanto Eto Bebi.
1Bebe kase sɔ̃ɔ̃ Anto Onanto laala bomba léfo Yesu bɔ́nɔɔ. Nyaso waakpadi bo nkǝ wǝ bebi nɛ. Nya boyifo Onanto eto bebi sitinti. Nnya eso kawunsiǝ eto betidi lenyi bo ni bǝnkǝ, benyi Onanto. 2Mɔ bayimi lala, mɔmɔɔ, buyifo Onanto eto bebi. Fɛɛ betidi ba eto okle buubǝ bofiani, Onanto mǝnlǝkǝ óte bo tɔ. Fɛɛ buyi buǝ lefe nǝ Kristo luubǝǝ, buutsyǝ fe wǝ ke seka. Itsyise buunyǝ wǝ fe kase unte sitinti. 3Nya utsyuǝ saa ke nkpe kusubebe komfo lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, aalɔ wǝ ǝsuǝ kǝtsyǝsǝ kɛnkɛ fe kase Kristo tsya diyifo kɛnkɛ.
4Utsyuǝ saa ke leeyifo lebua, aata Onanto eto kɔfi kebu. Itsyise lebua eyifo Onanto eto kɔfi bota kebu. 5Nya biyi biǝ bubǝ Kristo díbǝ nkǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Nya wǝǝ, lebua saa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. 6Nyaso utsyuǝ saa ke nsi nkpǝ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, ǝnsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua, lǝ bote nkǝ wǝnnyǝ tɔ Kristo, nya taa mɔmɔ kulaa tsya wante wǝ tɔ.
7Mɔ bebi lalaa, biǝntǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpé. Utsyuǝ saa ke leeyifo asa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ fe kase Kristo diyifo ɔsɛɛ nɛ. 8Utsyuǝ saa ke nsi nkpǝ lǝ lebua ǝsuǝǝ, eyifo Obonsam eto ole. Itsyise Obonsam éyifo lebua taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ kamǝ ke. Nyamfo eso Onanto eto Ubi díbǝ kawunsiǝ nɛ nkǝ lǝ obiasǝ Obonsam eto eyifosa bua nyamǝ.
9Utsyuǝ saa ke ni Onanto eto ubii, ǝnsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua. Itsyise Onanto eto ditsyǝbi kpé lǝ wǝ. Wǝmbofo busiǝ keyifo lebua se Onanto ni wǝ Anto eso. 10Letekɛkɛ nǝ nkpe lǝ Onanto eto bebi ku Obonsam eto bebi nti ni bǝ, utsyuǝ saa wǝ ke leenyifo kasɛɛ nye waanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, eni Onanto eto ubi.
Bela Bǝtsyuǝ.
11Kɛnyɛ ka bɛnɔ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ni bǝnkǝ, ele bǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ. 12Yanle bǝ butsyǝ fe Kain, nwǝ didi Obonsam eto ubi, nya ólo wǝ ɔyimisani. Nya beso Kain lelo wǝ? Ólo wǝ itsyise wǝ Kain eto eyifosa mányɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ nya wǝ ɔyimisani eto eyifosa áyɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ eso.
13Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, yenyifo mi naa lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi ekisi mi. 14Buyi boǝ bɔ́bɔ lǝ ukpe kǝmiǝ bubǝ busi lǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ. Buyi nko itsyise boala bo bayimitsyuǝ. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ si nkpǝ lǝ ukpe eto ǝsuǝale kǝmiǝ. 15Utsyuǝ saa ke leekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, uyifo uwudifɔ. Nya mi kosate yi biǝ uwudifɔ saa ǝmbǝ nkpǝ manlo lǝ wǝ.
16Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya bunyi lesa nǝ ni lelabi nɛ, nya nnya ni bǝ Kristo éfi wǝ nkpǝ útǝ lǝ bo disi. Nyaso ele bǝ bo tsya fi bo nkpǝ butǝ lǝ bo bayimitsyuǝ eto disi. 17Lǝ utsyuǝ wǝ nkpe kɔnikalende ǝnyǝ nkǝ lesa ahiã wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fɛ wánwunsǝko wǝ bomu útsyi kama ókpé wǝǝ, ntsyǝ woofo bɔtɛyi nkǝ woala Onanto? 18Mɔ bebi lala, biǝntǝ lǝ bulǝkǝ lelabi bote lǝ kɛnyɛ fufu eto etiki ǝsuǝ ete. Bomu bitǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ bɔwunsǝko lǝ sitinti ǝsuǝ. 19Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, boote boǝ buyifo ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ eto bale, nya buunyǝ kǝnyǝkɔ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. 20Lǝ bo akɔɛsi alo bo dikpi kulaa tsyaa, buyi boǝ Onanto amɔ oso bo akɔɛsi, nya unyi lesa saa.
21Nyaso, mɔ bayimi lala, lǝ bo akɔɛsi manlo bo dikpii, bokpe kǝnyǝkɔ ku nkɛale lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. 22Boafo lesa nǝ boatɔ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ itsyise boetsyue wǝ afi nyamǝ koto nya boeyifo lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. 23Kɔfi ko ókpe bo ni nkǝ bofo wǝ ubi Yesu Kristo bɔnɔ lǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ fe kase Kristo lɛtɔ utsyiko bo ɔflɔ. 24Utsyuǝ saa ke leetsyue Onanto eto kɔfi koto ǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku Onanto, nya Onanto tsya lǝǝsiǝko wǝ. Nya lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dífi útǝ bo esoo, buyi boǝ Onanto si ko bo.

Title: 1 YOHANES 4
Content:
Beto Lɛwɔnɔ Saa Bebe.
1Mɔ bayimi lala, biamfo utsyuǝ saa wǝ laatɛyi nkǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ si lǝ wǝ bɛnɔ. Bomu beto mǝ bebe lǝ bete lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Itsyise bidia, bidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi éboba bákpo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalebe saa. 2Nya kase fɔɔyɛ ate lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ ni bǝ utsyuǝ saa laatɛyi nkǝ Yesu Kristo ǝbǝ kawunsiǝ fe utidinini, kpé Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. 3Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke dímamfo ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yesu ǝbǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo fe utidininii, eto lɛwɔnɔ mentsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eyifo Kristo eto olo eto lɛwɔnɔ. Bɛnɔ biǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ebubǝ. Nya mɔmɔɔ, díubǝ lekpé lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo koko.
4Fɛɛ, mɔ bebi lala, biyifo Onanto eto bale nya bítǝkǝ bidiabidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kato itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ nkpe lǝ mii, kpé kɛnyɛale leso mba ni kawunsiǝ mfo eto betidi eto lɛwɔnɔ. 5Se ini kawunsiǝ mfo betsyi esoo, kawunsiǝ mfo eto asa ǝsuǝ ete beedi etiki ketsyiko, nya mba ditsyi kawunsiǝ mfo leetsyue mǝ koto. 6Fɛ boo, Onanto eto bale buni. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ nyi Onantoo, eetsyue bo ditiki koto, nya nwǝ ke leni Onanto eto olee, entsyue bo koto. Nyamfo ni kase boǝnyǝ kǝtsyǝ lekpoo, Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ni ɔnukualɛ eto lele ku nǝ ni bidiabidia eto lele.
Nyamfo Lǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto Eto Lelabi Kate Nɛ.
7Mɔ bayimi lala, bitǝ lǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ. Itsyise lelabi etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ laala utidii, eyifo Onanto eto ubi, nya unyi Onanto tsya. 8Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laanla betidii, enyi Onanto. Itsyise Onanto eyifo lelabi. 9Kusu ko Onanto lɛyɛ úlǝkǝ wǝ lelabi ote bo ni bǝ ótsyese wǝ Ubi lala ɔni ǝmǝ kplo lǝ kawunsiǝ, bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bunyǝ nkpǝ manlo. 10Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya bóte lesa nǝ ko ni lelabi nɛ. Inni lǝ kase boala Onanto bomu bǝ waala bo nya ótsyese wǝ Ubi nkǝ lǝ ɛyɛ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ufi bo abua batsyɛ bo.
11Bayimi lala, lǝ mmǝ ni kase Onanto léla boo, nyalɛ ele bǝ bola bo bǝtsyuǝ. 12Kuutsyuǝ mǝnyǝ tɔ Onanto unyǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ boala bǝtsyuǝǝ, Onanto eyifo ɔni ku bo, nya ɔflɔsǝ wǝ lelabi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.
13Buyi sitinti boǝ bokpé lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya wuutsya nkpe lǝ bo, itsyise úfi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ bo. 14Búnyǝ nya búfi nnya bóbe letsya butǝ bǝtidi bamba boǝ Onanto átsyese wǝ Ubi nkǝ lǝ ubǝ ofiani Ofomfokǝtǝ itǝ kawunsiǝ kenke. 15Lǝ utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ote nkǝ Yesu eyifo Onanto eto Ubii, ete bǝ Onanto kpé wǝ ǝsuǝ nya wuutsya nkpe lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ. 16Nya bunyi nya bófo lelabi nǝ Onanto dífi útǝ bo bɔ́nɔ. Onanto eyifo lelabi, nya nwǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, si nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku Onanto nya Onanto tsya nsi nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku bo. 17Nyamfo eso ele bǝ lelabi flɔ lǝ bofo ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ bofo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise bo nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo akateko Kristo eto nle. 18Sikpitete saa ǝmbǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Bomu lelabi nǝ lɛflɔ aala sikpitete katsyese kama. Nyaso nwǝ laate asa sikpi eto lelabi mamflɔ lelo, itsyise sikpitete ku kotonǝnǝ ayɛnko bǝtsyuǝ.
19Boala Onanto itsyise wǝ leka bo bola. 20Lǝ utsyuǝ aatɛyi nkǝ waala Onanto fɛ weekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, odia uni. Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ wǝ wǝǝnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi, ntsyǝ woofo Onanto wǝ wǝǝnnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi bola? 21Kɔfi ko Kristo dítǝ bo ni nkǝ, utsyuǝ saa ke laala Onanto, ele bǝ ola wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ tsya.

Title: 1 YOHANES 5
Content:
Bo Bofokanɔ Ǝtǝkǝ Kawunsiǝ Kato.
1Betidi ba kenke lefo banɔ bǝ Yesu ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝǝ, eyifo Onanto eto bebi. Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laala antoo, ala wǝ ubi tsya. 2Nyaso lǝ boala Onanto nya boeyifo lǝ wǝ afi ǝsuǝǝ, eté bo boǝ boala Onanto eto bebi tsya. 3Lǝ buyifo lǝ Onanto eto afi ǝsuǝǝ, ete bǝ boala wǝ. Onanto eto afi ǝsuǝ buyifoo, enni lesa nǝ nso ale bɔkɛ. 4Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ ni Onanto eto ubi, ǝtǝkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo kato. Nya boafo nyamfo buyifo ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. 5Nya owoe loofo kawunsiǝ kato butǝkǝ? Nwǝ hã te léfo ɔnɔ́ nkǝ Yesu ni Onanto eto ubi.
Adansiɛdidi Lǝ Yesu Ǝsuǝ.
6Yesu Kristo ni utidi wǝ díbǝ kawunsiǝ lǝ ntu ku kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ntu ɛyɛ lǝ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa ǝsuǝ ku kɔtɔ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ukpe ǝsuǝ. Wǝǝmbǝ lǝ ntu mate ǝsuǝ, bomu lǝ ntu ku kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ kosate lɛ adansiɛ budi kate nkǝ nyamfo eyifo sitinti, itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ eyifo ɔnukualɛ. 7Badansiɛ itsyǝ nkpe. 8Mǝ ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ, ntu bomǝ ku kɔtɔ komǝ. Nya mǝ itsyǝ bamǝ lɛ adansiɛ ani budi. 9Bofo utidi eto adansiɛ bɔnɔ, fɛɛ Onanto eto adansiɛ kpé kɛnyɛale kaso, nya wǝ dídi adansiɛ nyamfo itsyi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ. 10Nyaso utidi wǝ ke lefo Onanto eto Ubi ɔnɔɔ, waafo asa nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ ɔnɔ. Fɛɛ utidi wǝ ke dímamfo Onanto ɔ́nɔɔ, ǝǝnyǝ Onanto fe odia etsyise wámfo sedansiɛ sia údi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ ɔ́nɔ 11Nnya ɔ́tɛyi ni nkǝ, útǝ bo nkpǝ bo lǝmbǝ kalosǝkɔ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ. 12Utsyuǝ saa wǝ léfo Onanto eto Ubi ɔ́nɔ, nkpǝ bomfo éboka mi kɔni nkoko. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ dímamfo Ubi ǝmǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, embǝ nkpǝ bomfo.
Akpe Nkpe Bo Lembolo Kulefe.
13Nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔnɔ kǝtǝ mimba léfo Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ bɛnɔ lǝ bete biǝ nkpǝ manlo éboka mi kɔni. 14Boakpé utu, kefi ǝnǝ kǝtǝkǝ lǝ Onantoo ǝsuǝ boǝ lǝ bɔtɔ wǝ lesaatsyuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, woanɔ nnya. 15Waanɔ lefe nǝ ke bɔtɔ wǝ asa, nya se bunyi nko esoo, buyi tsya boǝ wǝǝtǝ bo lesa nǝ bɔtɔ wǝ.
16Lǝ utsyuǝ ǝnyǝ wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ ɔnlɛ lebua ditsyue nǝ lǝǝnnǝ ukpe kaboko buyifoo, ele bǝ oto ola utǝ Onanto wǝ luutǝ wǝ nkpǝ. Mba leeyifo lebua nǝ lǝǝnnǝ ukpe kaboko eto etiki ni nyamfo nɛ. Fɛɛ lebua ditsyuǝ kpe nǝ lǝǝnǝ ukpe kaboko. Inni lebua nǝmfo eto okle eto disi minlɛ miǝ bato ola. 17Lesa saa nǝ lanyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ buyifo eyifo lebua, fɛɛ abua ǝtsyuǝ kpé nya lǝǝnnǝ utidi kakpe lǝ ukpe ǝsuǝ.
18Buyi boǝ utsyuǝ saa ke ni Onanto eto ubii, enyifo lebua, itsyise Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ aabe wǝ, nya obuale ǝmǝ amfo wǝ kabua saa buyifo.
19Buyi boǝ Onanto eto bale buni, fɛɛ kawunsiǝ kenke kpé lǝ obuale ǝmǝ eto ǝsuǝale kalɔ. 20Buyi boǝ Onanto eto Ubi ǝbǝ, nya útǝ bɔ́nɔ asa kasɔ nya lǝ bote Onanto tinti ǝmǝ. Busi nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku wǝ ni sitinti ku wǝ Ubi Yesu Kristo. Nwǝmfo ni Onanto tinti ǝmǝ, lǝǝtǝ bo nkpǝ manlo nɛ.
21Nyaso, mɔ bebi lala, bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ bǝfiǝ eto keditǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

Title: 2 YOHANES 1
Content:
1Kukue komfo etsyi mi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto uninǝ ɔflɔ kutǝ fǝ usio wǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ útǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ bebi ba maala tinti. Enni mɔ maate laala mi, bomu ku mba tã nyi ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ laala mi sitinti. 2Itsyise ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ eyi bo lǝ ǝsuǝ nya diɔkɛ lǝ bo isu ese manlo.
3Boanto Onanto ǝmǝ ku Yesu Kristo, Anto eto Ubi ǝmǝ lǝ bǝnǝ bo kafo nya lǝ bǝnyǝ bo kaminsǝ, bǝtǝ bo diyuǝ, bo mba laala bo bǝtsyuǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.
Bitǝkǝko Kristo Eto Asatete Kama.
4Iyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ tinti se mínyǝ miǝ fǝ bebi bǝtsyuǝ si nkpǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase Anto ǝmǝ lɛtɔ utsyiko bo ɔflɔ. 5Mmǝ eso minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi, Ambe Ububutidi, bǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ. Nyamfo enni kɔfi fɔfɔ minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, bomu iyifo kɔfi ko bófo itsyi taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke. 6Lelabi eto asa nnya minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi ni nkǝ ele bǝ buyifo lǝ Onanto eto kɔfi ǝsuǝ. Nya kɔfi komfo, fe kase mimblɛ kenke lɛnɔ idu taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ni bǝnkǝ, mimblɛ siǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ ku mi bǝtsyuǝ.
7Betidi ba laawɛ betidi kpǝ ébɔbɔ batsyilama kawunsiǝ. Mǝ ni betidi ba laatɛyi bǝnkǝ Yesu Kristo mǝmbǝ kawunsiǝ mfo fe utidinini seka. Nwǝ laawɛ betidi ǝmǝ, eyifo Kristo eto olo. 8Nyaso bebe mi ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ bǝ nnya bekplatsya bɛnlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝǝ, manya, bomu bǝ lǝ binyǝ nnya kayofofo ka lɛflɔ.
9Utsyuǝ saa ke dímanlɛ Kristo eto asatete nyamǝ lǝ kɔni bomu óté asa bambaa, Onanto ensiko wǝ. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke lɛlɛ Kristo eto asatete lǝ kɔni, Anto ǝmǝ ku Ubi ǝmǝ tsya si ko wǝ. 10Nyamfo esoo, lǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ nya ɔnnlɛ asateete nyamfo lǝ kɔnii, biamfo wǝ lǝ mi ayo, nya biǝntǝ wǝ diyuǝ eto edufǝ. 11Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ loofo wǝ utǝ wǝ diyuǝ eto edufǝǝ, éyifo ani ku wǝ lǝ wǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.
Yohanes Ákla Mǝ.
12Nkpe asa kpe nya ele bǝ ntɛyi mi, fɛɛ manla miǝ lǝ nwɔni nya lǝ kukue ǝsuǝ ntsyese mi. Bomu nlɛ kusu bɔbɛbɛ bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔ lǝ budi etiki ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi butǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝ lǝ bo disuǝyuǝ nǝmǝ lǝ lɛflɔ.
13Fǝ ɔyimisio wǝ tsya Onanto dílǝkǝ eto bebi bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ.

Title: 3 YOHANES 1
Content:
1Ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala Gaio, mɔ bafokanɔfɔ eto uninǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ fǝ. Maala fǝ lǝ sitinti eto ditiki nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.
2Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, nlɛ ola boto miǝ lǝ lesa saa lǝ lɛlɛkɛ ditǝ fǝ nya lǝ akɛ ǝsuǝale. Nyi miǝ ite fe kase fǝńyǝ kekleke lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. 3Nnyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti se bafokanɔfɔ eto bayimitsyuǝ díbǝ bátɛyi mɛ kase fanlɛ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝ kekleke lǝ kɔni fe kase fálɛ ni kɔ seka ke. 4Se mínɔ bǝ mɔ bebi lɛ nkpǝ busiǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝǝ, nnyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti.
Bafokanɔfɔ Átɛsǝ Gaio.
5Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, eyifo nwǝ leeyifo kasɛyifo kǝtǝ fǝ bayimi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ, lǝ bafɔ beni kulaa tsya. 6Bǝbǝ bátɛyi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa mfo kase fala mǝ. Nyaso nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa lǝ awunsǝko mǝ lǝ bakɛ mǝ asa nnya loofe itǝ mǝ fe kase ińyǝ itǝ Onanto eto keyifo bǝ lǝ besukosǝ mǝ kusu ko banyɛ sɛtɔ. 7Itsyise bǝtsyǝ kasɔ mǝ kusu bɔyɛ kafe lǝ Kristo eto keyifo ǝsuǝ nya bámfo bɔwunsǝko saa betsyiko lǝ mba lenni bafokanɔfɔ ɔflɔ. 8Mmǝ eso ele bǝ bafokanɔfɔ wunsǝko betidi bamfo eto okle. Nyamfo loote bǝ buyifo bani ku mǝ lǝ keyifo kǝtǝ Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.
Yohanes Edi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Diotrefo Ku Demetrio Esuǝ.
9Nwɔni kukuǝ kutsyuǝ ntsyese bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ, fɛɛ Diotrefo wǝ léla nkǝ weedi mǝ ɔtɔnkpe mfó anla nkǝ wetsyue lesa nǝ maatɛyi koto. 10Lǝ mbǝǝ, muulǝkǝ lesa saa nǝ úyifo nte, asa bua nnya ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ku bidia bia waatɛyi. Fɛɛ nyamfo mǝnsiǝ tɔ, wǝǝmbofo bayimi ba ni bafokanɔfɔ ku kafo faa lǝ bǝbǝ mfó. Nya weeti mba laala bǝ baafo mǝ kusu nya waala nkǝ waala mǝ ulǝkǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ nti.
11Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, mǝntǝkǝko lebuayifoyifo kama. Bomu tǝkǝko kasɛyifoyifo kama. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo kasɛɛ eyifo Onanto eto ole. Fɛɛ nwǝ leeyifo asa buaa, mánte tɔ Onanto.
12Utsyuǝ saa eedi etiki sɛɛ ketsyiko lǝ Demetrio ǝsuǝ. Nya ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ kosate eedi etiki sɛɛ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bo ǝmǝ tsya lɛ adansiɛ budi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya eyi fǝ lesa nǝ boatɛyi eyifo ɔnukualɛ.
Yohanes Ákla Mǝ.
13Asa kpǝ kpe ele bǝ ntɛyi fǝ, fɛɛ manla miǝ maawɔni nnya ntsyese fǝ. 14Bomu nla miǝ mǝǝbǝ fǝ ɔflɔ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ nya lǝ budi etiki butǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi.
15Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝnko fǝ. Fǝ bayimitsyuǝ lǝ mfo kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ. Mǝǝsiǝsǝ bayimitsyuǝ saa kukɔnɔ.

Title: YUDA 1
Content:
1Kukue komfo etsyi mɔ, Yuda, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔyɛ ku Yakobo eto ɔyimisani ɔflɔ, itǝ mba Onanto lékpadi ba nsi nkpǝ lǝ Anto Onanto eto lelabi ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto bobe ǝsuǝ. 2Onanto eto kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ, diyuǝ ku lelabi lǝ disiǝko mi kenke, lebé lekpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.
Bulǝ Ebutu Bidiabidia Eto Bateasa.
3Mɔ bayimitsyuǝ lala, iyifo mɔ lelabi kekleke miǝ eni nwɔni kukue ntǝ mi itsyi lǝ kase Onanto léfo bomblɛ lǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ nsusu bamba esi búbǝ mɛ nkǝ efe bǝ nwɔni kukue komfo ntǝ mi mlǝ lǝ mfi nkpe mi nkɛale bǝ lǝ beta bofokanɔ eto kusu komǝ disi kekleke. Bofokanɔ bo Onanto dífi útǝ wǝ betidi lɔni kplo. 4Itsyise betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba laante Onanto sikpi ábiɔ bédufǝ lǝ mi nti, betidi ba laatsyi Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝmǝ kawunisǝ, bǝ lǝ ekate itǝ mǝ nkpǝ bua bo bensi ǝsuǝ. Betidi bamfo áni bo Okankplɛ ɔni kplo ǝmǝ Yesu Kristo wǝ ni Bonamute. Lefe kpǝ nǝ díbǝ lefe mǝǝ, Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ átɛyi itsyǝ dikpilolo nǝ bákafo ɛyɛ lǝ mǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.
5Ite bǝ biyi nyamfo kenke tsyaa, nsi nla miǝ meedi mi etiki itsyi lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ Israelfɔ utsyiko Egipte eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́tsylɔsǝ mba dímamfo wǝ bánɔ kenke. 6Bekloma biǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe ba dímankɛ lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya bǝtǝ mǝ kalɔɔ, nya báni mǝ nsiǝkɔ bo Onanto dítǝ mǝ, nya ókle mǝ lǝ amana ǝsuǝ óto ókpe lǝ ketuntu kamǝ kǝmiǝ kaka úfi mǝ útsyǝ isu eyo Diyi Kplɛ Fɛfɛ nɛ ǝsuǝ boolo mǝ dikpi. 7Bekloma Sodom ku Gomora ku kǝmǝ ka letsyilama mfó ǝsuǝ, ba eto betidi díyifo fe batɔnkpe ba dísiǝ nkpe bua seka ku lǝ sɛsɔnɔdi eto nkpesiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nnya esoo, Onanto dífi ute manlo ótonsǝ mǝ bǝ lǝ iyifo kotonǝnǝ eto bulǝkǝ kate eto ditsyǝbi.
8Nkomǝ ke betidi bamǝ mfo lǝǝnyǝ kǝlǝkǝkate bo lǝtǝ beeyifo lebua kǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ kula tsya ǝsuǝ. Bǝǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ nya beedi etiki kǝńyǝ lǝ kato eto asa nnya nkpé dibu ǝsuǝ. 9Kato eto Ɔtɔnkpe Ninǝ Mikael kula tsya ményifo nko. Lǝ lefe nǝ wǝ ku Obonsam lékpe dinyǝfi lǝ futsyǝ loofo Moses eto ɔkɔ ǝsuǝǝ, Mikael méntsyue Obonsam kɛnyɛ ku aka. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute lǝ uyǝnki okpe fǝ!” 10Fɛɛ betidi bamfo eto oklee, lesa nǝ ke eto kasɔ bannɔ koo, baaka nya beekudi katsyese. Nya asa nnya benyi ɛyɛ lǝ kolebe ǝsuǝ fe kase bebuki tsya nyi sekaa, nnya ni lesa nǝ tututu laatsylɔsǝ mǝ nǝ.
11Mbɔbuɛ itǝ mǝ! Itsyise kusu ko ǝsuǝ Kain lɛyɛɛ, ko ǝsuǝ ke mǝ tsya lɛyɛ nɛ. Lǝ atabi esoo, mǝ tsya lǝ kǝnǝnsɛ ǝsuǝ áyɛ lǝ kusu bua fe Balam ke, bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya bátsylɔsɛ mǝ fe Kora seka ke. 12Lǝ betsya lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ biǝ biedi Bonamute eto didisaa, mǝ afanisa yifoyifo aabiasǝ mi botsya bomǝ. Baate ǝsuǝ nya beedi kemi lǝ kase ke baala ǝsuǝ. Mǝ ǝsuǝ eto lɛlɛkǝsǝ hã ete baabɛbɛ. Bete fe asɔmiloku nnya laanni ɔsɔmi nya ufiebi laasɔ nnya ketsyi kedunko. Nya beyifo fe eyi nnya laannwɔ lǝ nnya lɛwɔfe, nnya díyifo fe béku ku keyudu bákpo lǝ kasɔ nya nyamblɛ kenke díkpǝ ékoe. Nya bente fe befandebi bia nlɛ botsyilama bia Onanto lɛlɔ kalebe útsyǝ útǝ lǝ ketuntu eto ketuntu ǝsuǝ itǝ lefe manlo. 13Beyifo fe ufiebi wǝ laasɔ lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ nnya yǝǝtǝ mǝ afanisayifoyifo laakpɔ kabe kato fe lekpo eto efukpɔkpɔ seka.
14Betidi bamfo ǝsuǝ Henok wǝ ni Adam eto kafo kuansele eto ubilele dídi etiki ɔ́tɛyɛ útsyǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute ku wǝ batɔnkpe kɛnkɛ akpi akpi ebubǝ. 15Nya ookponko betidi ba kenke lekpo. Ookponko betidi ba leentsyue koto lǝ asa bua nnya kenke béyifo ku lǝ etiki bua nnya betidi ba leentsyue wǝ koto mfo dídi bǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ tsya eso.” 16Betidi bamfo eedi etiki kawɔnɔnɔ kalo betidi bamba dikpi. Beefi nsusu lǝ asa bua ǝsuǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ nya bǝǝtǝko mǝ kosate et alasa bua ǝsuǝ, kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato nya beedi etiki ku kɛnyɛ minimini kawɛ betidi bǝ lǝ bayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝǝnyǝ lesa nǝ banlɛ bɔbɛbɛ.
Bifi Mi Ǝsuǝ Bitǝkǝ Lǝ Kristo Ǝsuǝ.
17Fɛɛ mɔ bayimi, bekloma etiki nnya Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto batɔnkpe lɛtɛyi mi lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝ. 18Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ eyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝǝ, betidi ebɔbɔ bǝbǝ bedi etiki bǝkǝmǝ mi nya booyifo lesa saa nǝ baala lǝ Onanto membukabe ǝsuǝ.” 19Mǝ ni betidi ba laakpe kǝsǝnsǝ lǝ betidi nti, ba ini mǝ ǝsuǝ eto lɛlɛkɛsǝ ete baabɛbɛ, nya Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ lǝmbǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.
20Fɛɛ mi, mɔ bayimii, bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝkǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale muǝmuǝ lǝ mi bofokanɔ kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ. Beto ola bɛyɛnko lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. 21Bifi mi ǝsuǝ bekpe lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bɛnlɛ kusu bobe bǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ebunyǝ mi kaminsǝ utǝ mi nkpǝ manlo.
22Lǝ nyamfo esoo, binyǝ mba eto bofokanɔ dimǝmuǝ tɔ ale kaminsǝ. 23Bǝtsyuǝ ba nlɛ budufǝ lǝ ute ǝsuǝǝ, binǝ mǝ bilǝkǝ, nya bǝtsyuǝ tsyaa, binyǝ mǝ kaminsǝ, tsya fɛɛ lǝ sikpitete ǝsuǝ. Nya bikisi mǝ ditsyǝbi bua nǝ nte fe ǝsuǝ eto bikǝlɛlɛ bia diyi ku asinsa nnya loofo mi bobiasǝ.
Maato Ola Kǝtǝ Onanto Lǝ Mi Disi.
24Nya wǝ nwǝ loofo mi bɔkɔbe kalɛ lǝ wǝ ani nya biemutusǝ bidu bɛnɔɔ, lǝ uyifo mi kɛnkɛ bǝ kabua saa mankɛ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝ binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ bisu bɛbɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmi. 25Wǝ ni Onanto ɔni kplo wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, diyǝnde, sɛkplɛ, lɛmɔ ku ǝsuǝale itǝ wǝ idu lǝ lefe nǝ léfe, ku mɔmɔ isu manlo! Ibǝ itǝ.

Title: KƎLƎKƎ KATE 1
Content:
1Kukue komfo eto asa eyifo asa nnya Onanto dítǝ nkǝ Yesu Kristo lǝkǝ ote beyifoyifo lǝ nnya lǝǝbǝ bubǝ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ. Kristo ǝtǝ Yohanes wǝ ni wǝ uyifoyifo áte nyamfo lǝ lefe nǝ ótsyese Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe wǝ ɔflɔ. 2Nya Yohanes lɛtɛyi asa nnya kenke únyǝ. Nyǝ nyamfo ni kɛnyɛ ka ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ ku ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝ Yesu Kristo dílǝkǝ óte. 3Disuǝyuǝ itǝ nwǝ lookla kukue komfo, nya disuǝyuǝ itǝ betidi ba tsya lɔɔnɔ Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ eto etiki nyamfo nya bootsyue asa nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ kukue komfo koto. Itsyise lefe nǝ ǝsuǝ asa nyamfo luubǝ ebɔfi.
Yohanes Ǝsiǝsǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Etsyukpa Akuanse Nya Nkpe Lǝ Asia Eto Lekpake Mfó.
4Mɔ Yohanes uni lɛwɔni kukue komfo minlɛ mi bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa akuanse nnya nkpe lǝ Asia eto lekpake nǝmfo botsyese.
Lefonǝ ku diyuǝ nǝ ditsyi Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ mɔmɔ, wǝ dísiǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ, wǝ nsi nlɛ bubǝ, lǝ usiǝko mi lefe nǝ kenke. Nko ke awɔnɔ akuanse nnya ńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto lekankpomɛ eto ǝnǝmi 5ku Yesu Kristo wǝ ni ɔnukualɛ odansiɛnyǝ wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto létakasǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ tutɛ nya uni kasɔ mfo eto baka kenke eto oka wǝ ntǝkǝ kato eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Waala bo, nya úlǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ bo abua ǝsuǝ ku wǝ kɔtɔ. 6Nya útsyǝ sekakedikɔ útǝ bo, úyifo bo besumunyǝ lǝ busumu wǝ Onanto ku Anto ǝmǝ. Yesu Kristo eto ale ni diyǝnde ku ǝsuǝale idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.
7Bebe! Utǝkǝ lǝ asɔmiloku ǝsuǝ ɔlɛ bubɛ!
Utsyuǝ saa ebunyǝ wǝ
ku mba léto wǝ afle kenke tsya.
Kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke ebuwi kaminsǝku bembe ku binǝntu lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ!
Ibǝ itǝ.
8Bonamute Onanto, Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ni kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ku kaalosǝkɔ, wǝ nkpe mɔmɔ, wǝ lɛkɛ taa ketsyikokɔ, wǝ nsi nlɛ bubǝ.”
Yesu Kpe Ǝsuǝale Lǝ Ukpe Ku Bekpenkpe Ǝsuǝ.
9Mɔ Yohanes, mi ɔyimi wǝ dítǝkǝko Yesu ku mi, nya biakpe utu kakplatsya lǝ disuǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ kǝnyǝ kanyi ka leetu mba ni wǝ sekakedikɔ kamǝ eto bale. Béti mɛ bakpe lǝ kasɔ ka ntu letsyilama baakpo Patmos itsyise mbe Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya ku ɔnukualɛ wǝ Yesu dílǝkǝ óte eso. 10Lǝ Bonamute eto diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ áyifǝ dísiǝ lǝ mɛ, ete mínnɔ ɔkɔɛ wǝ léle bembembe fe kakpatsyaku eto kakle lǝ mɔ kama eti. 11Ɔkɔɛ ǝmǝ átɛyi nkǝ, “Wɔni lesa nǝ fǝnyǝ ǝtsyǝ nya lǝ efi kukue komfo atsyese bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nnya nkpe lǝ kǝmǝnkplɛ ekuanse kamfo. Ke ni Efeso, Smirna, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia, ku Laodikea.”
12Nya lefe nǝ míntsyi míwunisǝmiǝ lǝ mbe futsyǝ nlɛ mɛ etiki budinkoo, nnyǝ sika sia eto kakandiɛyi ekuanse. 13Nnyǝ lǝ ke nti lesa nǝ lele utidi eto ditsyǝbi nǝ nkpe awukɛntsyɛ nnya dikulǝ ekpo wǝ lǝ nkpato nya seka eto abɔsu nkle wǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. 14Wǝ disi eto sewɔni eflubi futututu fe osamu eto sele nye olokotuku nya wǝ ǝnǝmi nlɛ buyǝnde fe ute wǝ nlɛ buńyǝ. 15Wǝ nkpato lɛ buyǝnde fe ayiwa nnya bǝlǝkǝ lǝ ute bási lele nya wǝ ɔkɔɛ eto nnya nlɛ bɔbɔ lele ketu eto ntu bo ditsyi koba kato bɔnlɛ boto lǝ ditumbu kasɔ eto kudu. 16Utidi ǝmǝ ákɔbe befandebi bekuanse ɔlɛ lǝ wǝ kodiani. Nya lesiabi nyɛ nnuǝ yayaya lɛbɔ dítsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ. Nya wǝ ǝnǝmi kenke nlɛ buyǝnde fe nkɔminti eto kofe.
